availableCommands.name: debug
availableCommands.description: Enable debug logging for this session and help diagnose issues (bundled)

availableCommands.name: simplify
availableCommands.description: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: batch
availableCommands.description: Research and plan a large-scale change, then execute it in parallel across 5–30 isolated worktree agents that each open a PR. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: loop
availableCommands.description: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) (bundled)

availableCommands.name: claude-api
availableCommands.description:
Build apps with the Claude API or Anthropic SDK.
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`/`claude_agent_sdk`, or user asks to use Claude API, Anthropic SDKs, or Agent SDK.
DO NOT TRIGGER when: code imports `openai`/other AI SDK, general programming, or ML/data-science tasks. (bundled)

availableCommands.name: gsd:settings
availableCommands.description: Configure GSD workflow toggles and model profile (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:audit-milestone
availableCommands.description: Audit milestone completion against original intent before archiving (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:research-phase
availableCommands.description: Research how to implement a phase (standalone - usually use /gsd:plan-phase instead) (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:discuss-phase
availableCommands.description: Gather phase context through adaptive questioning before planning (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:remove-phase
availableCommands.description: Remove a future phase from roadmap and renumber subsequent phases (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:add-phase
availableCommands.description: Add phase to end of current milestone in roadmap (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:quick
availableCommands.description: Execute a quick task with GSD guarantees (atomic commits, state tracking) but skip optional agents (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:cleanup
availableCommands.description: Archive accumulated phase directories from completed milestones (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:health
availableCommands.description: Diagnose planning directory health and optionally repair issues (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:reapply-patches
availableCommands.description: Reapply local modifications after a GSD update (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:complete-milestone
availableCommands.description: Archive completed milestone and prepare for next version (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:pause-work
availableCommands.description: Create context handoff when pausing work mid-phase (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:check-todos
availableCommands.description: List pending todos and select one to work on (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:list-phase-assumptions
availableCommands.description: Surface Claude's assumptions about a phase approach before planning (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:new-milestone
availableCommands.description: Start a new milestone cycle — update PROJECT.md and route to requirements (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:progress
availableCommands.description: Check project progress, show context, and route to next action (execute or plan) (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:resume-work
availableCommands.description: Resume work from previous session with full context restoration (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:execute-phase
availableCommands.description: Execute all plans in a phase with wave-based parallelization (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:new-project
availableCommands.description: Initialize a new project with deep context gathering and PROJECT.md (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:set-profile
availableCommands.description: Switch model profile for GSD agents (quality/balanced/budget) (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:map-codebase
availableCommands.description: Analyze codebase with parallel mapper agents to produce .planning/codebase/ documents (user)

input.hint: [optional: specific area to map, e.g., 'api' or 'auth']

availableCommands.name: gsd:plan-milestone-gaps
availableCommands.description: Create phases to close all gaps identified by milestone audit (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:verify-work
availableCommands.description: Validate built features through conversational UAT (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:debug
availableCommands.description: Systematic debugging with persistent state across context resets (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:update
availableCommands.description: Update GSD to latest version with changelog display (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:help
availableCommands.description: Show available GSD commands and usage guide (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:insert-phase
availableCommands.description: Insert urgent work as decimal phase (e.g., 72.1) between existing phases (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:join-discord
availableCommands.description: Join the GSD Discord community (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:add-todo
availableCommands.description: Capture idea or task as todo from current conversation context (user)

availableCommands.name: gsd:plan-phase
availableCommands.description: Create detailed phase plan (PLAN.md) with verification loop (user)

availableCommands.name: compact
availableCommands.description: Clear conversation history but keep a summary in context. Optional: /compact [instructions for summarization]

availableCommands.name: context
availableCommands.description: Show current context usage

availableCommands.name: heapdump
availableCommands.description: Dump the JS heap to ~/Desktop

availableCommands.name: init
availableCommands.description: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation

availableCommands.description: Get comments from a GitHub pull request

availableCommands.name: review
availableCommands.description: Review a pull request

Find all source files related to the sidebar UI in this project. I need files that handle:
- Sidebar component/panel
- Project tree / project list
- Session list in sidebar

- Category collapse state

- Session count badge

    31→  handleCategoryDragStart: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string) => void
    32→  handleCategoryDragEnd: () => void
    33→  handleCategoryHeaderDragOver: (
    34→    e: React.DragEvent,
    35→    targetCategoryId: string,
    36→    position: 'before' | 'after'
    37→  ) => void
    38→  handleCategoryHeaderDrop: (e: React.DragEvent, targetCategoryId: string) => void
    39→}
    40→
    41→export function useDragAndDrop({
    42→  projects,
    43→  moveProjectToCategory,
    44→  reorderProjects,
    45→  reorderCategories,
    46→  categories,
    47→}: UseDragAndDropOptions): UseDragAndDropReturn {
    48→  const [draggedProject, setDraggedProject] = useState<string | null>(null)
    49→  const [draggedCategory, setDraggedCategory] = useState<string | null>(null)
    50→  const [dropTarget, setDropTarget] = useState<DropTarget | null>(null)
    51→
    52→  const handleProjectDragStart = useCallback((e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string) => {
    53→    setDraggedProject(projectPath)
    54→    e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move'
    55→    e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', projectPath)
    56→    // Also set custom type so TiledTerminalView can detect sidebar project drags
    57→    e.dataTransfer.setData('application/x-sidebar-project', projectPath)
    58→  }, [])
    59→
    60→  const handleProjectDragEnd = useCallback(() => {
    61→    setDraggedProject(null)
    62→    setDropTarget(null)
    63→  }, [])
    64→
    65→  const handleCategoryDragOver = useCallback(
    66→    (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => {
    67→      e.preventDefault()
    68→      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move'
    69→      if (draggedProject) {
    70→        setDropTarget({
    71→          type: categoryId ? 'category' : 'uncategorized',
    72→          id: categoryId,
    73→        })
    74→      }
    75→    },
    76→    [draggedProject]
    77→  )
    78→
    79→  const handleCategoryDrop = useCallback(
    80→    (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => {
    81→      e.preventDefault()
    82→      if (draggedProject) {
    83→        moveProjectToCategory(draggedProject, categoryId)
    84→      }
    85→      setDraggedProject(null)
    86→      setDropTarget(null)
    87→    },
    88→    [draggedProject, moveProjectToCategory]
    89→  )
    90→
    91→  const handleProjectDragOver = useCallback(
    92→    (e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string, position: 'before' | 'after') => {
    93→      e.preventDefault()
    94→      e.stopPropagation()
    95→      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move'
    96→      if (draggedProject && draggedProject !== projectPath) {
    97→        setDropTarget({ type: 'project', id: projectPath, position })
    98→      }
    99→    },
   100→    [draggedProject]
   101→  )
   102→
   103→  const handleProjectDrop = useCallback(
   104→    (e: React.DragEvent, targetPath: string, targetCategoryId: string | undefined) => {
   105→      e.preventDefault()
   106→      e.stopPropagation()
   107→
   108→      if (draggedProject && draggedProject !== targetPath) {
   109→        const draggedProjectData = projects.find((p) => p.path === draggedProject)
   110→        const targetProject = projects.find((p) => p.path === targetPath)
   111→
   112→        if (draggedProjectData && targetProject) {
   113→          moveProjectToCategory(draggedProject, targetCategoryId ?? null)
   114→          const categoryProjects = projects
   115→            .filter((p) =>
   116→              targetCategoryId ? p.categoryId === targetCategoryId : !p.categoryId
   117→            )
   118→            .sort((a, b) => (a.order ?? 0) - (b.order ?? 0))
   119→            .map((p) => p.path)
   120→
   121→          const newOrder = categoryProjects.filter((p) => p !== draggedProject)
   122→          const targetIndex = newOrder.indexOf(targetPath)
   123→          const insertIndex = dropTarget?.position === 'after' ? targetIndex + 1 : targetIndex
   124→          newOrder.splice(insertIndex, 0, draggedProject)
   125→          reorderProjects(targetCategoryId ?? null, newOrder)
   126→        }
   127→      }
   128→      setDraggedProject(null)
   129→      setDropTarget(null)
   130→    },
   131→    [draggedProject, projects, dropTarget, moveProjectToCategory, reorderProjects]
   132→  )
   133→
   134→  const handleCategoryDragStart = useCallback((e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string) => {
   135→    setDraggedCategory(categoryId)
   136→    e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move'
   137→    e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', categoryId)
   138→  }, [])
   139→
   140→  const handleCategoryDragEnd = useCallback(() => {
   141→    setDraggedCategory(null)
   142→    setDropTarget(null)
   143→  }, [])
   144→
   145→  const handleCategoryHeaderDragOver = useCallback(
   146→    (e: React.DragEvent, targetCategoryId: string, position: 'before' | 'after') => {
   147→      e.preventDefault()
   148→      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move'
   149→      if (draggedCategory && draggedCategory !== targetCategoryId) {
   150→        setDropTarget({ type: 'category', id: targetCategoryId, position })
   151→      }
   152→    },
   153→    [draggedCategory]
   154→  )
   155→
   156→  const handleCategoryHeaderDrop = useCallback(
   157→    (e: React.DragEvent, targetCategoryId: string) => {
   158→      e.preventDefault()
   159→      if (draggedCategory && draggedCategory !== targetCategoryId) {
   160→        const orderedCategories = [...categories].sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order)
   161→        const categoryIds = orderedCategories.map((c) => c.id)
   162→        const newOrder = categoryIds.filter((id) => id !== draggedCategory)
   163→        const targetIndex = newOrder.indexOf(targetCategoryId)
   164→        const insertIndex = dropTarget?.position === 'after' ? targetIndex + 1 : targetIndex
   165→        newOrder.splice(insertIndex, 0, draggedCategory)
   166→        reorderCategories(newOrder)
   167→      }
   168→      setDraggedCategory(null)
   169→      setDropTarget(null)
   170→    },
   171→    [draggedCategory, categories, dropTarget, reorderCategories]
   172→  )
   173→
   174→  return {
   175→    draggedProject,
   176→    draggedCategory,
   177→    dropTarget,
   178→    handleProjectDragStart,
   179→    handleProjectDragEnd,
   180→    handleCategoryDragOver,
   181→    handleCategoryDrop,
   182→    handleProjectDragOver,
   183→    handleProjectDrop,
   184→    handleCategoryDragStart,
   185→    handleCategoryDragEnd,
   186→    handleCategoryHeaderDragOver,
   187→    handleCategoryHeaderDrop,
   188→  }
   189→}

1→import { Project } from '../../stores/workspace.js'
     2→
     3→export function adjustMenuPosition(
     4→  menu: HTMLElement,
     5→  position: { x: number; y: number },
     6→  padding = 8
     7→): { x: number; y: number } {
     8→  const rect = menu.getBoundingClientRect()
     9→  let { x, y } = position
    10→
    11→  if (rect.right > window.innerWidth - padding) {
    12→    x = window.innerWidth - rect.width - padding
    13→  }
    14→  if (rect.bottom > window.innerHeight - padding) {
    15→    y = window.innerHeight - rect.height - padding
    16→  }
    17→
    18→  return {
    19→    x: Math.max(padding, x),
    20→    y: Math.max(padding, y)
    21→  }
    22→}
    23→
    24→export function getLuminance(hex: string): number {
    25→  const r = parseInt(hex.slice(1, 3), 16) / 255
    26→  const g = parseInt(hex.slice(3, 5), 16) / 255
    27→  const b = parseInt(hex.slice(5, 7), 16) / 255
    28→
    29→  const toLinear = (c: number) => c <= 0.03928 ? c / 12.92 : Math.pow((c + 0.055) / 1.055, 2.4)
    30→
    31→  return 0.2126 * toLinear(r) + 0.7152 * toLinear(g) + 0.0722 * toLinear(b)
    32→}
    33→
    34→export function getCategoryGradient(categoryProjects: Project[]): { background: string; textDark: boolean } {
    35→  const colors = categoryProjects
    36→    .map(p => p.color)
    37→    .filter(Boolean) as string[]
    38→
    39→  if (colors.length === 0) return { background: 'transparent', textDark: false }
    40→
    41→  const avgLuminance = colors.reduce((sum, c) => sum + getLuminance(c), 0) / colors.length
    42→  const textDark = avgLuminance > 0.4
    43→
    44→  if (colors.length === 1) return { background: `${colors[0]}66`, textDark }
    45→
    46→  const stops = colors.map((c, i) =>
    47→    `${c}66 ${(i / (colors.length - 1)) * 100}%`
    48→  ).join(', ')
    49→
    50→  return { background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${stops})`, textDark }
    51→}
    52→
    53→export function formatDate(timestamp: number): string {
    54→  const diff = Date.now() - timestamp
    55→  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000)
    56→  const hours = Math.floor(diff / 3600000)
    57→  const days = Math.floor(diff / 86400000)
    58→
    59→  if (minutes < 1) return 'Just now'
    60→  if (minutes < 60) return `${minutes}m ago`
    61→  if (hours < 24) return `${hours}h ago`
    62→  if (days === 1) return 'Yesterday'
    63→  if (days < 7) return `${days}d ago`
    64→  return new Date(timestamp).toLocaleDateString()
    65→}
    66→

     3→export function adjustMenuPosition(
     4→  menu: HTMLElement,
     5→  position: { x: number; y: number },
     6→  padding = 8
     7→): { x: number; y: number } {
     8→  const rect = menu.getBoundingClientRect()
     9→  let { x, y } = position
    10→
    11→  if (rect.right > window.innerWidth - padding) {
    12→    x = window.innerWidth - rect.width - padding
    13→  }
    14→  if (rect.bottom > window.innerHeight - padding) {
    15→    y = window.innerHeight - rect.height - padding
    16→  }
    17→
    18→  return {
    19→    x: Math.max(padding, x),
    20→    y: Math.max(padding, y)
    21→  }
    22→}
    23→
    24→export function getLuminance(hex: string): number {
    25→  const r = parseInt(hex.slice(1, 3), 16) / 255
    26→  const g = parseInt(hex.slice(3, 5), 16) / 255
    27→  const b = parseInt(hex.slice(5, 7), 16) / 255
    28→
    29→  const toLinear = (c: number) => c <= 0.03928 ? c / 12.92 : Math.pow((c + 0.055) / 1.055, 2.4)
    30→
    31→  return 0.2126 * toLinear(r) + 0.7152 * toLinear(g) + 0.0722 * toLinear(b)
    32→}
    33→
    34→export function getCategoryGradient(categoryProjects: Project[]): { background: string; textDark: boolean } {
    35→  const colors = categoryProjects
    36→    .map(p => p.color)
    37→    .filter(Boolean) as string[]
    38→
    39→  if (colors.length === 0) return { background: 'transparent', textDark: false }
    40→
    41→  const avgLuminance = colors.reduce((sum, c) => sum + getLuminance(c), 0) / colors.length
    42→  const textDark = avgLuminance > 0.4
    43→
    44→  if (colors.length === 1) return { background: `${colors[0]}66`, textDark }
    45→
    46→  const stops = colors.map((c, i) =>
    47→    `${c}66 ${(i / (colors.length - 1)) * 100}%`
    48→  ).join(', ')
    49→
    50→  return { background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${stops})`, textDark }
    51→}
    52→
    53→export function formatDate(timestamp: number): string {
    54→  const diff = Date.now() - timestamp
    55→  const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000)
    56→  const hours = Math.floor(diff / 3600000)
    57→  const days = Math.floor(diff / 86400000)
    58→
    59→  if (minutes < 1) return 'Just now'
    60→  if (minutes < 60) return `${minutes}m ago`
    61→  if (hours < 24) return `${hours}h ago`
    62→  if (days === 1) return 'Yesterday'
    63→  if (days < 7) return `${days}d ago`
    64→  return new Date(timestamp).toLocaleDateString()
    65→}
    66→

1→import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react'
     2→import { Project } from '../../../stores/workspace.js'
     3→import { OpenTab, ClaudeSession } from '../types.js'
     4→import type { BackendId } from '../../../api/types'
     5→
     6→interface UseSessionsOptions {
     7→  projects: Project[]
     8→  openTabs: OpenTab[]
     9→  onOpenSession: (
    10→    projectPath: string,
    11→    sessionId?: string,
    12→    slug?: string,
    13→    initialPrompt?: string,
    14→    forceNewSession?: boolean
    15→  ) => void
    16→  onSwitchToTab: (tabId: string) => void
    17→}
    18→
    19→interface UseSessionsReturn {
    20→  expandedProject: string | null
    21→  setExpandedProject: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<string | null>>
    22→  sessions: Record<string, ClaudeSession[]>
    23→  toggleProject: (e: React.MouseEvent, path: string) => void
    24→  openMostRecentSession: (projectPath: string) => Promise<void>
    25→  handleOpenSession: (
    26→    projectPath: string,
    27→    sessionId?: string,
    28→    slug?: string,
    29→    isNewSession?: boolean
    30→  ) => void
    31→}
    32→
    33→export function useSessions({
    34→  projects,
    35→  openTabs,
    36→  onOpenSession,
    37→  onSwitchToTab,
    38→}: UseSessionsOptions): UseSessionsReturn {
    39→  const [expandedProject, setExpandedProject] = useState<string | null>(null)
    40→  const [sessions, setSessions] = useState<Record<string, ClaudeSession[]>>({})
    41→
    42→  // Load sessions when a project is expanded
    43→  useEffect(() => {
    44→    async function loadSessions(): Promise<void> {
    45→      if (expandedProject) {
    46→        try {
    47→          const project = projects.find((item) => item.path === expandedProject)
    48→          const backend = ((project?.backend && project.backend !== 'default')
    49→            ? project.backend
    50→            : 'claude') as BackendId
    51→          const projectSessions = (await window.electronAPI?.discoverSessions(
    52→            expandedProject,
    53→            backend
    54→          )) as ClaudeSession[] | undefined
    55→          setSessions((prev) => ({ ...prev, [expandedProject]: projectSessions ?? [] }))
    56→        } catch (e) {
    57→          console.error('Failed to discover sessions:', e)
    58→        }
    59→      }
    60→    }
    61→    loadSessions()
    62→  }, [expandedProject, projects])
    63→
    64→  const toggleProject = useCallback((e: React.MouseEvent, path: string) => {
    65→    e.stopPropagation()
    66→    setExpandedProject((prev) => (prev === path ? null : path))
    67→  }, [])
    68→
    69→  const openMostRecentSession = useCallback(
    70→    async (projectPath: string) => {
    71→      const existingTab = openTabs.find((tab) => tab.projectPath === projectPath)
    72→      const project = projects.find((item) => item.path === projectPath)
    73→      const effectiveBackend =
    74→        project?.backend && project.backend !== 'default' ? project.backend : 'claude'
    75→
    76→      if (existingTab) {
    77→        onSwitchToTab(existingTab.id)
    78→        return
    79→      }
    80→
    81→      const backend = (effectiveBackend || 'claude') as BackendId
    82→      let projectSessions = sessions[projectPath]
    83→
    84→      if (!projectSessions) {
    85→        try {
    86→          projectSessions = ((await window.electronAPI?.discoverSessions(projectPath, backend)) as ClaudeSession[] | undefined) ?? []
    87→          setSessions((prev) => ({ ...prev, [projectPath]: projectSessions! }))
    88→        } catch (e) {
    89→          console.error('Failed to discover sessions:', e)
    90→          projectSessions = []
    91→        }
    92→      }
    93→
    94→      if (projectSessions.length > 0) {
    95→        const mostRecent = projectSessions[0]
    96→        onOpenSession(projectPath, mostRecent.sessionId, mostRecent.slug)
    97→      } else {
    98→        onOpenSession(projectPath, undefined, undefined, undefined, false)
    99→      }
   100→    },
   101→    [openTabs, projects, sessions, onSwitchToTab, onOpenSession]
   102→  )
   103→
   104→  const handleOpenSession = useCallback(
   105→    (projectPath: string, sessionId?: string, slug?: string, isNewSession?: boolean) => {
   106→      if (sessionId) {
   107→        onOpenSession(projectPath, sessionId, slug)
   108→      } else if (isNewSession) {
   109→        // Explicit "New Session" click - always create a new session
   110→        onOpenSession(projectPath, undefined, undefined, undefined, true)
   111→      } else {
   112→        openMostRecentSession(projectPath)
   113→      }
   114→    },
   115→    [onOpenSession, openMostRecentSession]
   116→  )
   117→
   118→  return {
   119→    expandedProject,
   120→    setExpandedProject,
   121→    sessions,
   122→    toggleProject,
   123→    openMostRecentSession,
   124→    handleOpenSession,
   125→  }
   126→}
   127→

import React, { useState, useRef, useMemo } from 'react'
import { Project, useWorkspaceStore } from '../../stores/workspace.js'
import { useVoice } from '../../contexts/VoiceContext.js'
import { SidebarProps, OpenTab, ClaudeSession } from './types.js'
import { useSessions, useDragAndDrop, useProjectSettingsModal } from './hooks/index.js'

export interface SidebarState {
  // Voice context
  volume: number
  setVolume: (v: number) => void
  speed: number
  setSpeed: (s: number) => void
  skipOnNew: boolean
  setSkipOnNew: (s: boolean) => void
  voiceOutputEnabled: boolean

  // Workspace store
  categories: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories']
  addCategory: (name: string) => string
  updateCategory: (id: string, updates: Partial<{ name: string; collapsed: boolean }>) => void
  removeCategory: (id: string) => void
  reorderCategories: (categoryIds: string[]) => void
  moveProjectToCategory: (projectPath: string, categoryId: string | null) => void
  reorderProjects: (categoryId: string | null, projectPaths: string[]) => void

  // Custom hooks
  expandedProject: string | null
  sessions: Record<string, ClaudeSession[]>
  toggleProject: (e: React.MouseEvent, projectPath: string) => void
  handleOpenSession: (
    projectPath: string,
    sessionId?: string,
    slug?: string,
    isNewSession?: boolean
  ) => void

  // Drag and drop
  draggedProject: string | null
  draggedCategory: string | null
  dropTarget: { type: 'category' | 'project' | 'uncategorized'; id: string | null; position?: 'before' | 'after' } | null
  handleProjectDragStart: (e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string) => void
  handleProjectDragEnd: () => void
  handleCategoryDragOver: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => void
  handleCategoryDrop: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => void
  handleProjectDragOver: (e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string, position: 'before' | 'after') => void
  handleProjectDrop: (e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string, categoryId: string | undefined) => void
  handleCategoryDragStart: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string) => void
  handleCategoryDragEnd: () => void
  handleCategoryHeaderDragOver: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string, position: 'before' | 'after') => void
  handleCategoryHeaderDrop: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string) => void

  // Project settings modal
  projectSettingsModal: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['projectSettingsModal']
  installedVoices: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['installedVoices']
  globalVoiceSettings: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['globalVoiceSettings']
  globalPermissions: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['globalPermissions']
  apiStatus: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['apiStatus']
  setApiStatus: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['setApiStatus']
  handleOpenProjectSettings: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['handleOpenProjectSettings']
  handleSaveProjectSettings: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['handleSaveProjectSettings']
  handleToggleApi: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['handleToggleApi']
  setProjectSettingsModal: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['setProjectSettingsModal']
  handleToggleTool: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['handleToggleTool']
  handleAllowAll: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['handleAllowAll']
  handleClearAll: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['handleClearAll']
  handleProjectSettingsChange: ReturnType<typeof useProjectSettingsModal>['handleProjectSettingsChange']

  // Local state
  beadsExpanded: boolean
  setBeadsExpanded: (v: boolean) => void
  isResizing: boolean
  setIsResizing: (v: boolean) => void
  contextMenu: { x: number; y: number; project: Project } | null
  setContextMenu: (v: { x: number; y: number; project: Project } | null) => void
  categoryContextMenu: {
    x: number
    y: number
    category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]
  } | null
  setCategoryContextMenu: (
    v: {
      x: number
      y: number
      category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]
    } | null
  ) => void
  editingProject: { path: string; name: string } | null
  setEditingProject: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<{ path: string; name: string } | null>>
  editingCategory: { id: string; name: string } | null
  setEditingCategory: (v: { id: string; name: string } | null) => void
  isDebugMode: boolean
  setIsDebugMode: (v: boolean) => void
  extensionBrowserModal: { project: Project } | null
  setExtensionBrowserModal: (v: { project: Project } | null) => void
  claudeMdEditorModal: { project: Project } | null
  setClaudeMdEditorModal: (v: { project: Project } | null) => void
  deleteConfirmModal: { project: Project } | null
  setDeleteConfirmModal: (v: { project: Project } | null) => void
  taskCounts: Record<string, { open: number; inProgress: number }>
  setTaskCounts: (v: Record<string, { open: number; inProgress: number }>) => void

  // Refs
  sidebarRef: React.RefObject<HTMLDivElement>
  editInputRef: React.RefObject<HTMLInputElement>
  categoryEditInputRef: React.RefObject<HTMLInputElement>

  // Computed values
  focusedTabId: string | null
  focusedTab: OpenTab | undefined
  focusedProjectPath: string | null
  focusedTabPtyId: string | null
  beadsProjectPath: string | null
  focusedProject: Project | undefined
  sortedCategories: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories']
  projectsByCategory: Record<string, Project[]>
}

export interface UseSidebarStateParams {
  projects: Project[]
  openTabs: OpenTab[]
  activeTabId: string | null
  lastFocusedTabId: string | null
  onOpenSession: SidebarProps['onOpenSession']
  onSwitchToTab: SidebarProps['onSwitchToTab']
  onUpdateProject: SidebarProps['onUpdateProject']
}

export function useSidebarState(params: UseSidebarStateParams): SidebarState {
  const { projects, openTabs, activeTabId, lastFocusedTabId, onOpenSession, onSwitchToTab, onUpdateProject } = params

  // Voice context
  const { volume, setVolume, speed, setSpeed, skipOnNew, setSkipOnNew, voiceOutputEnabled } =
    useVoice()

  // Workspace store
  const categories = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.categories)
  const addCategory = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.addCategory)
  const updateCategory = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.updateCategory)
  const removeCategory = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.removeCategory)
  const reorderCategories = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.reorderCategories)
  const moveProjectToCategory = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.moveProjectToCategory)
  const reorderProjects = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.reorderProjects)

  // Custom hooks for extracted logic
  const { expandedProject, sessions, toggleProject, handleOpenSession } = useSessions({
    projects,
    openTabs,
    onOpenSession,
    onSwitchToTab,
  })

  const {
    draggedProject,
    draggedCategory,
    dropTarget,
    handleProjectDragStart,
    handleProjectDragEnd,
    handleCategoryDragOver,
    handleCategoryDrop,
    handleProjectDragOver,
    handleProjectDrop,
    handleCategoryDragStart,
    handleCategoryDragEnd,
    handleCategoryHeaderDragOver,
    handleCategoryHeaderDrop,
  } = useDragAndDrop({
    projects,
    moveProjectToCategory,
    reorderProjects,
    reorderCategories,
    categories,
  })

  const {
    projectSettingsModal,
    installedVoices,
    globalVoiceSettings,
    globalPermissions,
    apiStatus,
    setApiStatus,
    handleOpenProjectSettings,
    handleSaveProjectSettings,
    handleToggleApi,
    setProjectSettingsModal,
    handleToggleTool,
    handleAllowAll,
    handleClearAll,
    handleProjectSettingsChange,
  } = useProjectSettingsModal({ onUpdateProject })

  // Local state
  const [beadsExpanded, setBeadsExpanded] = useState(true)
  const [isResizing, setIsResizing] = useState(false)
  const [contextMenu, setContextMenu] = useState<{ x: number; y: number; project: Project } | null>(
    null
  )
  const [categoryContextMenu, setCategoryContextMenu] = useState<{
    x: number
    y: number
    category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]
  } | null>(null)
  const [editingProject, setEditingProject] = useState<{ path: string; name: string } | null>(null)
  const [editingCategory, setEditingCategory] = useState<{ id: string; name: string } | null>(null)
  const [isDebugMode, setIsDebugMode] = useState(false)
  const [extensionBrowserModal, setExtensionBrowserModal] = useState<{ project: Project } | null>(
    null
  )
  const [claudeMdEditorModal, setClaudeMdEditorModal] = useState<{ project: Project } | null>(null)
  const [deleteConfirmModal, setDeleteConfirmModal] = useState<{ project: Project } | null>(null)
  const [taskCounts, setTaskCounts] = useState<Record<string, { open: number; inProgress: number }>>(
    {}
  )

  // Refs
  const sidebarRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const editInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
  const categoryEditInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)

  // Computed values
  const focusedTabId = lastFocusedTabId || activeTabId
  const focusedTab = useMemo(
    () => openTabs.find((t) => t.id === focusedTabId),
    [openTabs, focusedTabId]
  )
  const focusedProjectPath = useMemo(() => focusedTab?.projectPath || null, [focusedTab])
  const focusedTabPtyId = useMemo(() => focusedTab?.ptyId || null, [focusedTab])
  const beadsProjectPath = useMemo(
    () => focusedProjectPath || expandedProject,
    [focusedProjectPath, expandedProject]
  )
  const focusedProject = useMemo(
    () => projects.find((p) => p.path === focusedProjectPath),
    [projects, focusedProjectPath]
  )

  // Computed groupings
  const sortedCategories = useMemo(
    () => [...categories].sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order),
    [categories]
  )

  const projectsByCategory = useMemo(() => {
    const grouped: Record<string, Project[]> = {}
    sortedCategories.forEach((cat) => {
      grouped[cat.id] = []
    })
    grouped['uncategorized'] = []

    projects.forEach((project) => {
      const key = project.categoryId || 'uncategorized'
      if (!grouped[key]) grouped[key] = []
      grouped[key].push(project)
    })

    Object.keys(grouped).forEach((key) => {
      grouped[key].sort((a, b) => (a.order ?? 0) - (b.order ?? 0))
    })

    return grouped
  }, [projects, sortedCategories])

  return {
    // Voice context
    volume,
    setVolume,
    speed,
    setSpeed,
    skipOnNew,
    setSkipOnNew,
    voiceOutputEnabled,

    // Workspace store
    categories,
    addCategory,
    updateCategory,
    removeCategory,
    reorderCategories,
    moveProjectToCategory,
    reorderProjects,

    // Sessions hook
    expandedProject,
    sessions,
    toggleProject,
    handleOpenSession,

    // Drag and drop hook
    draggedProject,
    draggedCategory,
    dropTarget,
    handleProjectDragStart,
    handleProjectDragEnd,
    handleCategoryDragOver,
    handleCategoryDrop,
    handleProjectDragOver,
    handleProjectDrop,
    handleCategoryDragStart,
    handleCategoryDragEnd,
    handleCategoryHeaderDragOver,
    handleCategoryHeaderDrop,

    // Project settings modal hook
    projectSettingsModal,
    installedVoices,
    globalVoiceSettings,
    globalPermissions,
    apiStatus,
    setApiStatus,
    handleOpenProjectSettings,
    handleSaveProjectSettings,
    handleToggleApi,
    setProjectSettingsModal,
    handleToggleTool,
    handleAllowAll,
    handleClearAll,
    handleProjectSettingsChange,

    // Local state
    beadsExpanded,
    setBeadsExpanded,
    isResizing,
    setIsResizing,
    contextMenu,
    setContextMenu,
    categoryContextMenu,
    setCategoryContextMenu,
    editingProject,
    setEditingProject,
    editingCategory,
    setEditingCategory,
    isDebugMode,
    setIsDebugMode,
    extensionBrowserModal,
    setExtensionBrowserModal,
    claudeMdEditorModal,
    setClaudeMdEditorModal,
    deleteConfirmModal,
    setDeleteConfirmModal,
    taskCounts,
    setTaskCounts,

    // Refs
    sidebarRef,
    editInputRef,
    categoryEditInputRef,

    // Computed values
    focusedTabId,
    focusedTab,
    focusedProjectPath,
    focusedTabPtyId,
    beadsProjectPath,
    focusedProject,
    sortedCategories,
    projectsByCategory,
  }
}

   128→export function useSidebarState(params: UseSidebarStateParams): SidebarState {
   129→  const { projects, openTabs, activeTabId, lastFocusedTabId, onOpenSession, onSwitchToTab, onUpdateProject } = params

   131→  // Voice context

   139→  const removeCategory = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.removeCategory)
   140→  const reorderCategories = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.reorderCategories)
   141→  const moveProjectToCategory = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.moveProjectToCategory)
   142→  const reorderProjects = useWorkspaceStore((state) => state.reorderProjects)
   143→
   144→  // Custom hooks for extracted logic
   145→  const { expandedProject, sessions, toggleProject, handleOpenSession } = useSessions({
   146→    projects,
   147→    openTabs,
   148→    onOpenSession,
   149→    onSwitchToTab,
   150→  })
   151→
   152→  const {

   154→    draggedCategory,
   155→    dropTarget,
   156→    handleProjectDragStart,
   157→    handleProjectDragEnd,
   158→    handleCategoryDragOver,
   159→    handleCategoryDrop,
   160→    handleProjectDragOver,

   165→    handleCategoryHeaderDrop,
   166→  } = useDragAndDrop({
   167→    projects,
   168→    moveProjectToCategory,
   169→    reorderProjects,
   170→    reorderCategories,
   171→    categories,
   172→  })
   173→
   174→  const {
   175→    projectSettingsModal,
   176→    installedVoices,
   177→    globalVoiceSettings,

   185→    handleToggleTool,

   188→    handleProjectSettingsChange,

   190→
   191→  // Local state
   192→  const [beadsExpanded, setBeadsExpanded] = useState(true)

   194→  const [contextMenu, setContextMenu] = useState<{ x: number; y: number; project: Project } | null>(

   202→  const [editingProject, setEditingProject] = useState<{ path: string; name: string } | null>(null)

   206→    null
   207→  )
   208→  const [claudeMdEditorModal, setClaudeMdEditorModal] = useState<{ project: Project } | null>(null)
   209→  const [deleteConfirmModal, setDeleteConfirmModal] = useState<{ project: Project } | null>(null)

   212→  )
   213→

   217→  const categoryEditInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
   218→
   219→  // Computed values
   220→  const focusedTabId = lastFocusedTabId || activeTabId
   221→  const focusedTab = useMemo(
   222→    () => openTabs.find((t) => t.id === focusedTabId),
   223→    [openTabs, focusedTabId]
   224→  )
   225→  const focusedProjectPath = useMemo(() => focusedTab?.projectPath || null, [focusedTab])
   226→  const focusedTabPtyId = useMemo(() => focusedTab?.ptyId || null, [focusedTab])
   227→  const beadsProjectPath = useMemo(

   238→    () => [...categories].sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order),
   239→    [categories]

   241→
   242→  const projectsByCategory = useMemo(() => {

   244→    sortedCategories.forEach((cat) => {

   247→    grouped['uncategorized'] = []

   279→    reorderProjects,

   296→    handleProjectDrop,

1→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import { Project, useWorkspaceStore } from '../../stores/workspace.js'
     3→import { SidebarState } from './useSidebarState.js'
     4→import { SidebarProps } from './types.js'
     5→
     6→// Use type assertion for extended electronAPI methods not in the base type
     7→const electronAPI = window.electronAPI as (typeof window.electronAPI) & {
     8→  selectExecutable?: () => Promise<string | null>
     9→  runExecutable?: (executable: string, cwd: string) => Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }>
    10→  getCategoryMetaPath?: (categoryName: string) => Promise<string>
    11→  getMetaProjectsPath?: () => Promise<string>
    12→}
    13→
    14→export interface SidebarHandlers {
    15→  // Project handlers
    16→  handleSelectExecutable: (project: Project) => Promise<void>
    17→  handleClearExecutable: (project: Project) => void
    18→  handleRunExecutable: (project: Project) => Promise<void>
    19→
    20→  // Rename handlers
    21→  handleStartRename: (e: React.MouseEvent, project: Project) => void
    22→  handleRenameSubmit: () => void
    23→  handleRenameKeyDown: (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => void
    24→
    25→  // Category handlers
    26→  handleAddCategory: () => void
    27→  handleOpenCategoryAsProject: (categoryName: string) => Promise<void>
    28→  handleOpenAllProjects: () => Promise<void>
    29→  handleStartCategoryRename: (
    30→    category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]
    31→  ) => void
    32→  handleCategoryRenameSubmit: () => void
    33→  handleCategoryRenameKeyDown: (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => void
    34→  toggleCategoryCollapse: (categoryId: string) => void
    35→
    36→  // Resize handler
    37→  handleMouseDown: (e: React.MouseEvent) => void
    38→
    39→  // Backdrop handler
    40→  handleBackdropClick: () => void
    41→}
    42→
    43→export interface UseSidebarHandlersParams {
    44→  state: SidebarState
    45→  onUpdateProject: SidebarProps['onUpdateProject']
    46→  onOpenSession: SidebarProps['onOpenSession']
    47→  isMobile: boolean
    48→  onMobileClose: (() => void) | undefined
    49→}
    50→
    51→export function useSidebarHandlers(params: UseSidebarHandlersParams): SidebarHandlers {
    52→  const { state, onUpdateProject, onOpenSession, isMobile, onMobileClose } = params
    53→  const {
    54→    setContextMenu,
    55→    editingProject,
    56→    setEditingProject,
    57→    editInputRef,
    58→    editingCategory,
    59→    setEditingCategory,
    60→    categoryEditInputRef,
    61→    addCategory,
    62→    updateCategory,
    63→    categories,
    64→    setIsResizing,
    65→    moveProjectToCategory,
    66→  } = state
    67→
    68→  // Project handlers
    69→  const handleSelectExecutable = useCallback(
    70→    async (project: Project) => {
    71→      const executable = await electronAPI?.selectExecutable?.()
    72→      if (executable) onUpdateProject(project.path, { executable })
    73→      setContextMenu(null)
    74→    },
    75→    [onUpdateProject, setContextMenu]
    76→  )
    77→
    78→  const handleClearExecutable = useCallback(
    79→    (project: Project) => {
    80→      onUpdateProject(project.path, { executable: undefined })
    81→      setContextMenu(null)
    82→    },
    83→    [onUpdateProject, setContextMenu]
    84→  )
    85→
    86→  const handleRunExecutable = useCallback(
    87→    async (project: Project) => {
    88→      if (project.executable) {
    89→        const result = await electronAPI?.runExecutable?.(project.executable, project.path)
    90→        if (result && !result.success) console.error('Failed to run executable:', result.error)
    91→      }
    92→      setContextMenu(null)
    93→    },
    94→    [setContextMenu]
    95→  )
    96→
    97→  // Rename handlers
    98→  const handleStartRename = useCallback(
    99→    (e: React.MouseEvent, project: Project) => {
   100→      e.stopPropagation()
   101→      setEditingProject({ path: project.path, name: project.name })
   102→      setTimeout(() => editInputRef.current?.select(), 0)
   103→    },
   104→    [setEditingProject, editInputRef]
   105→  )
   106→
   107→  const handleRenameSubmit = useCallback(() => {
   108→    if (editingProject && editingProject.name.trim()) {
   109→      onUpdateProject(editingProject.path, { name: editingProject.name.trim() })
   110→    }
   111→    setEditingProject(null)
   112→  }, [editingProject, onUpdateProject, setEditingProject])
   113→
   114→  const handleRenameKeyDown = useCallback(
   115→    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
   116→      if (e.key === 'Enter') handleRenameSubmit()
   117→      else if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingProject(null)
   118→    },
   119→    [handleRenameSubmit, setEditingProject]
   120→  )
   121→
   122→  // Category handlers
   123→  const handleAddCategory = useCallback(() => {
   124→    const newId = addCategory('New Category')
   125→    setEditingCategory({ id: newId, name: 'New Category' })
   126→    setTimeout(() => categoryEditInputRef.current?.select(), 0)
   127→  }, [addCategory, setEditingCategory, categoryEditInputRef])
   128→
   129→  const handleOpenCategoryAsProject = useCallback(
   130→    async (categoryName: string) => {
   131→      const metaPath = await electronAPI?.getCategoryMetaPath?.(categoryName)
   132→      if (metaPath) onOpenSession(metaPath)
   133→    },
   134→    [onOpenSession]
   135→  )
   136→
   137→  const handleOpenAllProjects = useCallback(async () => {
   138→    const metaPath = await electronAPI?.getMetaProjectsPath?.()
   139→    if (metaPath) onOpenSession(metaPath)
   140→  }, [onOpenSession])
   141→
   142→  const handleStartCategoryRename = useCallback(
   143→    (category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]) => {
   144→      setEditingCategory({ id: category.id, name: category.name })
   145→      setTimeout(() => categoryEditInputRef.current?.select(), 0)
   146→    },
   147→    [setEditingCategory, categoryEditInputRef]
   148→  )
   149→
   150→  const handleCategoryRenameSubmit = useCallback(() => {
   151→    if (editingCategory && editingCategory.name.trim()) {
   152→      updateCategory(editingCategory.id, { name: editingCategory.name.trim() })
   153→    }
   154→    setEditingCategory(null)
   155→  }, [editingCategory, updateCategory, setEditingCategory])
   156→
   157→  const handleCategoryRenameKeyDown = useCallback(
   158→    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
   159→      if (e.key === 'Enter') handleCategoryRenameSubmit()
   160→      else if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingCategory(null)
   161→    },
   162→    [handleCategoryRenameSubmit, setEditingCategory]
   163→  )
   164→
   165→  const toggleCategoryCollapse = useCallback(
   166→    (categoryId: string) => {
   167→      const category = categories.find((c) => c.id === categoryId)
   168→      if (category) updateCategory(categoryId, { collapsed: !category.collapsed })
   169→    },
   170→    [categories, updateCategory]
   171→  )
   172→
   173→  // Resize handler
   174→  const handleMouseDown = useCallback(
   175→    (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
   176→      e.preventDefault()
   177→      setIsResizing(true)
   178→    },
   179→    [setIsResizing]
   180→  )
   181→
   182→  // Backdrop handler
   183→  const handleBackdropClick = useCallback(() => {
   184→    if (isMobile && onMobileClose) {
   185→      onMobileClose()
   186→    }
   187→  }, [isMobile, onMobileClose])
   188→
   189→  return {
   190→    handleSelectExecutable,
   191→    handleClearExecutable,
   192→    handleRunExecutable,
   193→    handleStartRename,
   194→    handleRenameSubmit,
   195→    handleRenameKeyDown,
   196→    handleAddCategory,
   197→    handleOpenCategoryAsProject,
   198→    handleOpenAllProjects,
   199→    handleStartCategoryRename,
   200→    handleCategoryRenameSubmit,
   201→    handleCategoryRenameKeyDown,
   202→    toggleCategoryCollapse,
   203→    handleMouseDown,
   204→    handleBackdropClick,
   205→  }
   206→}
   207→
   208→// Helper for creating category with project
   209→export function useCreateCategoryWithProject(
   210→  state: SidebarState
   211→): (projectPath: string) => void {
   212→  const { addCategory, moveProjectToCategory, setContextMenu, setEditingCategory, categoryEditInputRef } = state
   213→
   214→  return useCallback(
   215→    (projectPath: string) => {
   216→      const newId = addCategory('New Category')
   217→      moveProjectToCategory(projectPath, newId)
   218→      setContextMenu(null)
   219→      setEditingCategory({ id: newId, name: 'New Category' })
   220→      setTimeout(() => categoryEditInputRef.current?.select(), 0)
   221→    },
   222→    [addCategory, moveProjectToCategory, setContextMenu, setEditingCategory, categoryEditInputRef]
   223→  )

     1→import { useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import { Project, useWorkspaceStore } from '../../stores/workspace.js'
     3→import { SidebarState } from './useSidebarState.js'
     4→import { SidebarProps } from './types.js'
     5→
     6→// Use type assertion for extended electronAPI methods not in the base type
     7→const electronAPI = window.electronAPI as (typeof window.electronAPI) & {
     8→  selectExecutable?: () => Promise<string | null>
     9→  runExecutable?: (executable: string, cwd: string) => Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }>
    10→  getCategoryMetaPath?: (categoryName: string) => Promise<string>
    11→  getMetaProjectsPath?: () => Promise<string>
    12→}
    13→
    14→export interface SidebarHandlers {
    15→  // Project handlers
    16→  handleSelectExecutable: (project: Project) => Promise<void>
    17→  handleClearExecutable: (project: Project) => void
    18→  handleRunExecutable: (project: Project) => Promise<void>
    19→
    20→  // Rename handlers
    21→  handleStartRename: (e: React.MouseEvent, project: Project) => void
    22→  handleRenameSubmit: () => void
    23→  handleRenameKeyDown: (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => void
    24→
    25→  // Category handlers
    26→  handleAddCategory: () => void
    27→  handleOpenCategoryAsProject: (categoryName: string) => Promise<void>
    28→  handleOpenAllProjects: () => Promise<void>
    29→  handleStartCategoryRename: (
    30→    category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]
    31→  ) => void
    32→  handleCategoryRenameSubmit: () => void
    33→  handleCategoryRenameKeyDown: (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => void
    34→  toggleCategoryCollapse: (categoryId: string) => void
    35→
    36→  // Resize handler
    37→  handleMouseDown: (e: React.MouseEvent) => void
    38→
    39→  // Backdrop handler
    40→  handleBackdropClick: () => void
    41→}
    42→
    43→export interface UseSidebarHandlersParams {
    44→  state: SidebarState
    45→  onUpdateProject: SidebarProps['onUpdateProject']
    46→  onOpenSession: SidebarProps['onOpenSession']
    47→  isMobile: boolean
    48→  onMobileClose: (() => void) | undefined
    49→}
    50→
    51→export function useSidebarHandlers(params: UseSidebarHandlersParams): SidebarHandlers {
    52→  const { state, onUpdateProject, onOpenSession, isMobile, onMobileClose } = params
    53→  const {
    54→    setContextMenu,
    55→    editingProject,
    56→    setEditingProject,
    57→    editInputRef,
    58→    editingCategory,
    59→    setEditingCategory,
    60→    categoryEditInputRef,
    61→    addCategory,
    62→    updateCategory,
    63→    categories,
    64→    setIsResizing,
    65→    moveProjectToCategory,
    66→  } = state
    67→
    68→  // Project handlers
    69→  const handleSelectExecutable = useCallback(
    70→    async (project: Project) => {
    71→      const executable = await electronAPI?.selectExecutable?.()
    72→      if (executable) onUpdateProject(project.path, { executable })
    73→      setContextMenu(null)
    74→    },
    75→    [onUpdateProject, setContextMenu]
    76→  )
    77→
    78→  const handleClearExecutable = useCallback(
    79→    (project: Project) => {
    80→      onUpdateProject(project.path, { executable: undefined })
    81→      setContextMenu(null)
    82→    },
    83→    [onUpdateProject, setContextMenu]
    84→  )
    85→
    86→  const handleRunExecutable = useCallback(
    87→    async (project: Project) => {
    88→      if (project.executable) {
    89→        const result = await electronAPI?.runExecutable?.(project.executable, project.path)
    90→        if (result && !result.success) console.error('Failed to run executable:', result.error)
    91→      }
    92→      setContextMenu(null)
    93→    },
    94→    [setContextMenu]
    95→  )
    96→
    97→  // Rename handlers
    98→  const handleStartRename = useCallback(
    99→    (e: React.MouseEvent, project: Project) => {
   100→      e.stopPropagation()
   101→      setEditingProject({ path: project.path, name: project.name })
   102→      setTimeout(() => editInputRef.current?.select(), 0)
   103→    },
   104→    [setEditingProject, editInputRef]
   105→  )
   106→
   107→  const handleRenameSubmit = useCallback(() => {
   108→    if (editingProject && editingProject.name.trim()) {
   109→      onUpdateProject(editingProject.path, { name: editingProject.name.trim() })
   110→    }
   111→    setEditingProject(null)
   112→  }, [editingProject, onUpdateProject, setEditingProject])
   113→
   114→  const handleRenameKeyDown = useCallback(
   115→    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
   116→      if (e.key === 'Enter') handleRenameSubmit()
   117→      else if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingProject(null)
   118→    },
   119→    [handleRenameSubmit, setEditingProject]
   120→  )
   121→
   122→  // Category handlers
   123→  const handleAddCategory = useCallback(() => {
   124→    const newId = addCategory('New Category')
   125→    setEditingCategory({ id: newId, name: 'New Category' })
   126→    setTimeout(() => categoryEditInputRef.current?.select(), 0)
   127→  }, [addCategory, setEditingCategory, categoryEditInputRef])
   128→
   129→  const handleOpenCategoryAsProject = useCallback(
   130→    async (categoryName: string) => {
   131→      const metaPath = await electronAPI?.getCategoryMetaPath?.(categoryName)
   132→      if (metaPath) onOpenSession(metaPath)
   133→    },
   134→    [onOpenSession]
   135→  )
   136→
   137→  const handleOpenAllProjects = useCallback(async () => {
   138→    const metaPath = await electronAPI?.getMetaProjectsPath?.()
   139→    if (metaPath) onOpenSession(metaPath)
   140→  }, [onOpenSession])
   141→
   142→  const handleStartCategoryRename = useCallback(
   143→    (category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]) => {
   144→      setEditingCategory({ id: category.id, name: category.name })
   145→      setTimeout(() => categoryEditInputRef.current?.select(), 0)
   146→    },
   147→    [setEditingCategory, categoryEditInputRef]
   148→  )
   149→
   150→  const handleCategoryRenameSubmit = useCallback(() => {
   151→    if (editingCategory && editingCategory.name.trim()) {
   152→      updateCategory(editingCategory.id, { name: editingCategory.name.trim() })
   153→    }
   154→    setEditingCategory(null)
   155→  }, [editingCategory, updateCategory, setEditingCategory])
   156→
   157→  const handleCategoryRenameKeyDown = useCallback(
   158→    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
   159→      if (e.key === 'Enter') handleCategoryRenameSubmit()
   160→      else if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingCategory(null)
   161→    },
   162→    [handleCategoryRenameSubmit, setEditingCategory]
   163→  )
   164→
   165→  const toggleCategoryCollapse = useCallback(
   166→    (categoryId: string) => {
   167→      const category = categories.find((c) => c.id === categoryId)
   168→      if (category) updateCategory(categoryId, { collapsed: !category.collapsed })
   169→    },
   170→    [categories, updateCategory]
   171→  )
   172→
   173→  // Resize handler
   174→  const handleMouseDown = useCallback(
   175→    (e: React.MouseEvent) => {
   176→      e.preventDefault()
   177→      setIsResizing(true)
   178→    },
   179→    [setIsResizing]
   180→  )
   181→
   182→  // Backdrop handler
   183→  const handleBackdropClick = useCallback(() => {
   184→    if (isMobile && onMobileClose) {
   185→      onMobileClose()
   186→    }
   187→  }, [isMobile, onMobileClose])
   188→
   189→  return {
   190→    handleSelectExecutable,
   191→    handleClearExecutable,
   192→    handleRunExecutable,
   193→    handleStartRename,
   194→    handleRenameSubmit,
   195→    handleRenameKeyDown,
   196→    handleAddCategory,
   197→    handleOpenCategoryAsProject,
   198→    handleOpenAllProjects,
   199→    handleStartCategoryRename,
   200→    handleCategoryRenameSubmit,
   201→    handleCategoryRenameKeyDown,
   202→    toggleCategoryCollapse,
   203→    handleMouseDown,
   204→    handleBackdropClick,
   205→  }
   206→}
   207→
   208→// Helper for creating category with project
   209→export function useCreateCategoryWithProject(
   210→  state: SidebarState
   211→): (projectPath: string) => void {
   212→  const { addCategory, moveProjectToCategory, setContextMenu, setEditingCategory, categoryEditInputRef } = state
   213→
   214→  return useCallback(
   215→    (projectPath: string) => {
   216→      const newId = addCategory('New Category')
   217→      moveProjectToCategory(projectPath, newId)
   218→      setContextMenu(null)
   219→      setEditingCategory({ id: newId, name: 'New Category' })
   220→      setTimeout(() => categoryEditInputRef.current?.select(), 0)
   221→    },
   222→    [addCategory, moveProjectToCategory, setContextMenu, setEditingCategory, categoryEditInputRef]
   223→  )
   224→}
   225→
```

     3→
     4→export interface ProjectCategory {
     5→  id: string

    36→}

    39→  projects: Project[]

    42→  categories: ProjectCategory[]
    43→
    44→  setProjects: (projects: Project[]) => void
    45→  addProject: (project: Project) => void
    46→  removeProject: (path: string) => void
    47→  updateProject: (path: string, updates: Partial<Project>) => void
    48→
    49→  addTab: (tab: OpenTab) => void
    50→  removeTab: (id: string) => void
    51→  updateTab: (id: string, updates: Partial<OpenTab>) => void
    52→  setActiveTab: (id: string) => void
    53→  clearTabs: () => void
    54→
    55→  setCategories: (categories: ProjectCategory[]) => void
    56→  addCategory: (name: string) => string
    57→  updateCategory: (id: string, updates: Partial<ProjectCategory>) => void
    58→  removeCategory: (id: string) => void
    59→  reorderCategories: (ids: string[]) => void
    60→  moveProjectToCategory: (projectPath: string, categoryId: string | null) => void
    61→  reorderProjects: (categoryId: string | null, projectPaths: string[]) => void
    62→}
    63→
    64→const generateCategoryId = (): string =>
    65→  `cat-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`
    66→
    67→export const useWorkspaceStore = create<WorkspaceState>((set, get) => ({
    68→  projects: [],
    69→  openTabs: [],
    70→  activeTabId: null,
    71→  categories: [],
    72→
    73→  setProjects: (projects) => set({ projects }),
    74→
    75→  addProject: (project) => {
    76→    const { projects } = get()
    77→    if (!projects.find((p) => p.path === project.path)) {
    78→      set({ projects: [...projects, project] })
    79→    }
    80→  },
    81→
    82→  removeProject: (path) => {
    83→    const { projects } = get()
    84→    clearProjectCaches(path)
    85→    set({ projects: projects.filter((p) => p.path !== path) })
    86→  },
    87→
    88→  updateProject: (path, updates) => {
    89→    const { projects } = get()
    90→    set({
    91→      projects: projects.map((p) =>
    92→        p.path === path ? { ...p, ...updates } : p
    93→      )
    94→    })
    95→  },
    96→
    97→  addTab: (tab) => {
    98→    const { openTabs } = get()
    99→    set({
   100→      openTabs: [...openTabs, tab],
   101→      activeTabId: tab.id
   102→    })
   103→  },
   104→
   105→  removeTab: (id) => {
   106→    const { openTabs, activeTabId } = get()
   107→    const newTabs = openTabs.filter((t) => t.id !== id)
   108→    let newActiveId = activeTabId
   109→
   110→    if (activeTabId === id) {
   111→      const index = openTabs.findIndex((t) => t.id === id)
   112→      if (newTabs.length > 0) {
   113→        newActiveId = newTabs[Math.min(index, newTabs.length - 1)].id
   114→      } else {
   115→        newActiveId = null
   116→      }
   117→    }
   118→
   119→    set({ openTabs: newTabs, activeTabId: newActiveId })
   120→  },
   121→
   122→  updateTab: (id, updates) => {
   123→    const { openTabs } = get()
   124→    set({
   125→      openTabs: openTabs.map((t) =>
   126→        t.id === id ? { ...t, ...updates } : t
   127→      )
   128→    })
   129→  },
   130→
   131→  setActiveTab: (id) => set({ activeTabId: id }),
   132→
   133→  clearTabs: () => set({ openTabs: [], activeTabId: null }),
   134→
   135→  setCategories: (categories) => set({ categories }),
   136→
   137→  addCategory: (name) => {
   138→    const { categories } = get()
   139→    const id = generateCategoryId()
   140→    const maxOrder = categories.reduce((max, c) => Math.max(max, c.order), -1)
   141→    set({
   142→      categories: [...categories, { id, name, collapsed: false, order: maxOrder + 1 }]
   143→    })
   144→    return id
   145→  },
   146→
   147→  updateCategory: (id, updates) => {
   148→    const { categories } = get()
   149→    set({
   150→      categories: categories.map((c) =>
   151→        c.id === id ? { ...c, ...updates } : c
   152→      )
   153→    })
   154→  },
   155→
   156→  removeCategory: (id) => {
   157→    const { categories, projects } = get()
   158→    set({
   159→      categories: categories.filter((c) => c.id !== id),
   160→      projects: projects.map((p) =>
   161→        p.categoryId === id ? { ...p, categoryId: undefined } : p
   162→      )
   163→    })
   164→  },
   165→
   166→  reorderCategories: (ids) => {
   167→    const { categories } = get()
   168→    set({
   169→      categories: categories.map((c) => ({
   170→        ...c,
   171→        order: ids.indexOf(c.id)
   172→      }))
   173→    })
   174→  },
   175→
   176→  moveProjectToCategory: (projectPath, categoryId) => {
   177→    const { projects } = get()
   178→    const categoryProjects = projects.filter((p) =>
   179→      categoryId === null ? !p.categoryId : p.categoryId === categoryId
   180→    )
   181→    const maxOrder = categoryProjects.reduce((max, p) => Math.max(max, p.order ?? -1), -1)
   182→    set({
   183→      projects: projects.map((p) =>
   184→        p.path === projectPath
   185→          ? { ...p, categoryId: categoryId ?? undefined, order: maxOrder + 1 }
   186→          : p
   187→      )
   188→    })
   189→  },
   190→
   191→  reorderProjects: (categoryId, projectPaths) => {
   192→    const { projects } = get()
   193→    set({
   194→      projects: projects.map((p) => {
   195→        const index = projectPaths.indexOf(p.path)
   196→        if (index >= 0) {
   197→          return { ...p, order: index }
   198→        }
   199→        return p
   200→      })
   201→    })
   202→  }
   203→}))

    47→  updateProject: (path: string, updates: Partial<Project>) => void
    48→
    49→  addTab: (tab: OpenTab) => void
    50→  removeTab: (id: string) => void
    51→  updateTab: (id: string, updates: Partial<OpenTab>) => void
    52→  setActiveTab: (id: string) => void
    53→  clearTabs: () => void
    54→
    55→  setCategories: (categories: ProjectCategory[]) => void
    56→  addCategory: (name: string) => string
    57→  updateCategory: (id: string, updates: Partial<ProjectCategory>) => void
    58→  removeCategory: (id: string) => void
    59→  reorderCategories: (ids: string[]) => void
    60→  moveProjectToCategory: (projectPath: string, categoryId: string | null) => void
    61→  reorderProjects: (categoryId: string | null, projectPaths: string[]) => void
    62→}
    63→
    64→const generateCategoryId = (): string =>
    65→  `cat-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`
    66→
    67→export const useWorkspaceStore = create<WorkspaceState>((set, get) => ({
    68→  projects: [],
    69→  openTabs: [],
    70→  activeTabId: null,
    71→  categories: [],
    72→
    73→  setProjects: (projects) => set({ projects }),
    74→
    75→  addProject: (project) => {
    76→    const { projects } = get()
    77→    if (!projects.find((p) => p.path === project.path)) {
    78→      set({ projects: [...projects, project] })
    79→    }
    80→  },
    81→
    82→  removeProject: (path) => {
    83→    const { projects } = get()
    84→    clearProjectCaches(path)
    85→    set({ projects: projects.filter((p) => p.path !== path) })
    86→  },
    87→
    88→  updateProject: (path, updates) => {
    89→    const { projects } = get()
    90→    set({
    91→      projects: projects.map((p) =>
    92→        p.path === path ? { ...p, ...updates } : p
    93→      )
    94→    })
    95→  },
    96→
    97→  addTab: (tab) => {
    98→    const { openTabs } = get()
    99→    set({
   100→      openTabs: [...openTabs, tab],
   101→      activeTabId: tab.id
   102→    })
   103→  },
   104→
   105→  removeTab: (id) => {
   106→    const { openTabs, activeTabId } = get()
   107→    const newTabs = openTabs.filter((t) => t.id !== id)
   108→    let newActiveId = activeTabId
   109→
   110→    if (activeTabId === id) {
   111→      const index = openTabs.findIndex((t) => t.id === id)
   112→      if (newTabs.length > 0) {
   113→        newActiveId = newTabs[Math.min(index, newTabs.length - 1)].id
   114→      } else {
   115→        newActiveId = null
   116→      }
   117→    }
   118→
   119→    set({ openTabs: newTabs, activeTabId: newActiveId })
   120→  },
   121→
   122→  updateTab: (id, updates) => {
   123→    const { openTabs } = get()
   124→    set({
   125→      openTabs: openTabs.map((t) =>
   126→        t.id === id ? { ...t, ...updates } : t
   127→      )
   128→    })
   129→  },
   130→
   131→  setActiveTab: (id) => set({ activeTabId: id }),
   132→
   133→  clearTabs: () => set({ openTabs: [], activeTabId: null }),
   134→
   135→  setCategories: (categories) => set({ categories }),
   136→
   137→  addCategory: (name) => {
   138→    const { categories } = get()
   139→    const id = generateCategoryId()
   140→    const maxOrder = categories.reduce((max, c) => Math.max(max, c.order), -1)
   141→    set({
   142→      categories: [...categories, { id, name, collapsed: false, order: maxOrder + 1 }]
   143→    })
   144→    return id
   145→  },
   146→
   147→  updateCategory: (id, updates) => {
   148→    const { categories } = get()
   149→    set({
   150→      categories: categories.map((c) =>
   151→        c.id === id ? { ...c, ...updates } : c
   152→      )
   153→    })
   154→  },
   155→
   156→  removeCategory: (id) => {
   157→    const { categories, projects } = get()
   158→    set({
   159→      categories: categories.filter((c) => c.id !== id),
   160→      projects: projects.map((p) =>
   161→        p.categoryId === id ? { ...p, categoryId: undefined } : p
   162→      )
   163→    })
   164→  },
   165→
   166→  reorderCategories: (ids) => {
   167→    const { categories } = get()
   168→    set({
   169→      categories: categories.map((c) => ({
   170→        ...c,
   171→        order: ids.indexOf(c.id)
   172→      }))
   173→    })
   174→  },
   175→
   176→  moveProjectToCategory: (projectPath, categoryId) => {
   177→    const { projects } = get()
   178→    const categoryProjects = projects.filter((p) =>
   179→      categoryId === null ? !p.categoryId : p.categoryId === categoryId
   180→    )
   181→    const maxOrder = categoryProjects.reduce((max, p) => Math.max(max, p.order ?? -1), -1)
   182→    set({
   183→      projects: projects.map((p) =>
   184→        p.path === projectPath
   185→          ? { ...p, categoryId: categoryId ?? undefined, order: maxOrder + 1 }
   186→          : p
   187→      )
   188→    })
   189→  },
   190→
   191→  reorderProjects: (categoryId, projectPaths) => {
   192→    const { projects } = get()
   193→    set({
   194→      projects: projects.map((p) => {
   195→        const index = projectPaths.indexOf(p.path)
   196→        if (index >= 0) {
   197→          return { ...p, order: index }
   198→        }
   199→        return p
   200→      })
   201→    })
   202→  }
   203→}))
   204→

   117→    (e: React.MouseEvent, project: Project) => {

   121→  )

   123→  const handleProjectEditingChange = useCallback(

   148→  handlers: SidebarHandlers,
   149→  openTabs: OpenTab[]
   150→): unknown[] {
   151→  const {
   152→    expandedProject,
   153→    focusedProjectPath,
   154→    draggedProject,
   155→    editingProject,
   156→    sessions,
   157→    taskCounts,
   158→    dropTarget,
   159→    handleProjectDragEnd,
   160→  } = state
   161→  const { handleRenameSubmit, handleRenameKeyDown } = handlers
   162→
   163→  return [
   164→    expandedProject,
   165→    focusedProjectPath,
   166→    openTabs,
   167→    draggedProject,
   168→    editingProject,
   169→    sessions,
   170→    taskCounts,
   171→    dropTarget,
   172→    callbacks.handleProjectToggleExpand,
   173→    callbacks.handleProjectOpenSession,
   174→    callbacks.handleProjectRunExecutable,
   175→    callbacks.handleProjectCloseProjectTabs,
   176→    callbacks.handleProjectContextMenu,
   177→    callbacks.handleProjectItemDragStart,
   178→    handleProjectDragEnd,
   179→    callbacks.handleProjectItemDragOver,
   180→    callbacks.handleProjectItemDrop,
   181→    callbacks.handleProjectStartRename,
   182→    callbacks.handleProjectEditingChange,
   183→    handleRenameSubmit,
   184→    handleRenameKeyDown,
   185→  ]
   186→}
   187→
```
