1→import { useCallback, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     2→import type { Api } from '../api'
     3→import type { BackendId } from '../api/types'
     4→import type { AppSettings } from './useSettings'
     5→import { OpenTab, Project } from '../stores/workspace'
     6→import { TileLayout, DropZone, splitTile, addTileToLayout, addTabToExistingTile } from '../components/TiledTerminalView'
     7→import { clearTerminalBuffer } from '../components/terminal/Terminal'
     8→
     9→interface UseProjectHandlersOptions {
    10→  api: Api
    11→  projects: Project[]
    12→  openTabs: OpenTab[]
    13→  settings: AppSettings | null
    14→  tileLayout: TileLayout[]
    15→  addProject: (project: { path: string; name: string }) => void
    16→  removeTab: (id: string) => void
    17→  addTab: (tab: OpenTab) => void
    18→  setActiveTab: (id: string) => void
    19→  setTileLayout: (layout: TileLayout[]) => void
    20→}
    21→
    22→interface ClosedTabInfo {
    23→  projectPath: string
    24→  sessionId?: string
    25→  title: string
    26→  backend?: string
    27→}
    28→
    29→interface UseProjectHandlersReturn {
    30→  handleAddProject: () => Promise<void>
    31→  handleAddProjectsFromParent: () => Promise<void>
    32→  handleOpenSession: (projectPath: string, sessionId?: string, slug?: string, initialPrompt?: string, forceNewSession?: boolean) => Promise<void>
    33→  handleOpenSessionAtPosition: (projectPath: string, dropZone: DropZone | null, containerSize: { width: number; height: number }, currentLayout?: TileLayout[]) => Promise<void>
    34→  handleCloseTab: (tabId: string) => void
    35→  handleCloseProjectTabs: (projectPath: string) => void
    36→  handleProjectCreated: (projectPath: string, projectName: string) => void
    37→  handleUndoCloseTab: () => void
    38→  canUndoCloseTab: boolean
    39→}
    40→
    41→export function useProjectHandlers({
    42→  api,
    43→  projects,
    44→  openTabs,
    45→  settings,
    46→  tileLayout,
    47→  addProject,
    48→  removeTab,
    49→  addTab,
    50→  setActiveTab,
    51→  setTileLayout
    52→}: UseProjectHandlersOptions): UseProjectHandlersReturn {
    53→  const closedTabsRef = useRef<ClosedTabInfo[]>([])
    54→  const [closedTabCount, setClosedTabCount] = useState(0)
    55→
    56→  // Keep a ref to the latest tileLayout so async callbacks always read the freshest state
    57→  const tileLayoutRef = useRef(tileLayout)
    58→  tileLayoutRef.current = tileLayout
    59→
    60→  const handleAddProject = useCallback(async () => {
    61→    const path = await api.addProject()
    62→    if (path) {
    63→      const name = path.split(/[/\\]/).pop() || path
    64→      addProject({ path, name })
    65→      await api.ttsInstallInstructions?.(path)
    66→    }
    67→  }, [api, addProject])
    68→
    69→  const handleAddProjectsFromParent = useCallback(async () => {
    70→    const projectsToAdd = await api.addProjectsFromParent?.()
    71→    if (projectsToAdd && projectsToAdd.length > 0) {
    72→      const existingPaths = new Set(projects.map((p) => p.path))
    73→      const newProjects = projectsToAdd.filter((p) => !existingPaths.has(p.path))
    74→
    75→      for (const project of newProjects) {
    76→        addProject({ path: project.path, name: project.name })
    77→        await api.ttsInstallInstructions?.(project.path)
    78→      }
    79→    }
    80→  }, [api, addProject, projects])
    81→
    82→  const handleOpenSession = useCallback(async (projectPath: string, sessionId?: string, slug?: string, initialPrompt?: string, forceNewSession?: boolean) => {
    83→    // Check if this session is already open
    84→    if (sessionId) {
    85→      const existingTab = openTabs.find(tab => tab.sessionId === sessionId)
    86→      if (existingTab) {
    87→        setActiveTab(existingTab.id)
    88→        return
    89→      }
    90→    }
    91→
    92→    // Get project and determine effective backend
    93→    const project = projects.find((p) => p.path === projectPath)
    94→    const effectiveBackend = (project?.backend && project.backend !== 'default'
    95→      ? project.backend
    96→      : (settings?.backend && settings.backend !== 'default'
    97→        ? settings.backend
    98→        : 'claude')) as BackendId
    99→
   100→    // Only discover sessions if no specific sessionId was requested
   101→    if (!forceNewSession && !sessionId) {
   102→      try {
   103→        const sessions = await api.discoverSessions(projectPath, effectiveBackend)
   104→        if (sessions.length > 0) {
   105→          const [mostRecent] = sessions
   106→          const existingTab = openTabs.find((tab) => tab.sessionId === mostRecent.sessionId)
   107→
   108→          if (existingTab) {
   109→            setActiveTab(existingTab.id)
   110→            return
   111→          }
   112→          sessionId = mostRecent.sessionId
   113→          slug = mostRecent.slug
   114→        }
   115→      } catch (e) {
   116→        console.error('Failed to discover sessions for project:', e)
   117→      }
   118→    }
   119→
   120→    const projectName = projectPath.split(/[/\\]/).pop() || projectPath
   121→    const title = slug ? `${projectName} - ${slug}` : `${projectName} - New`
   122→
   123→    try {
   124→      await api.ttsInstallInstructions?.(projectPath)
   125→
   126→      const ptyId = await api.spawnPty(projectPath, sessionId, undefined, effectiveBackend)
   127→
   128→      // Compute tile layout BEFORE adding tab so both update together,
   129→      // preventing useEffectiveLayout from auto-adding at the wrong position
   130→      const currentLayout = tileLayoutRef.current
   131→      const newLayout = addTileToLayout(currentLayout, ptyId, null, window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight)
   132→
   133→      addTab({
   134→        id: ptyId,
   135→        projectPath,
   136→        sessionId,
   137→        title,
   138→        ptyId,
   139→        backend: effectiveBackend
   140→      })
   141→      setTileLayout(newLayout)
   142→
   143→      // If an initial prompt was provided, send it after a short delay
   144→      if (initialPrompt) {
   145→        setTimeout(() => {
   146→          api.writePty(ptyId, initialPrompt)
   147→          setTimeout(() => {
   148→            api.writePty(ptyId, '\r')
   149→          }, 100)
   150→        }, 1500)
   151→      }
   152→    } catch (e: any) {
   153→      console.error('Failed to spawn PTY:', e)
   154→      const errorMsg = e?.message || String(e)
   155→      alert(`Failed to start Claude session:\n\n${errorMsg}\n\nPlease ensure Claude Code is installed and try restarting the application.`)
   156→    }
   157→  }, [api, addTab, openTabs, projects, setActiveTab, settings?.backend, setTileLayout])
   158→
   159→  const handleOpenSessionAtPosition = useCallback(async (projectPath: string, dropZone: DropZone | null, containerSize: { width: number; height: number }, currentLayout?: TileLayout[]) => {
   160→    // Use the effective layout passed from the drop handler (matches what computeDropZone used),
   161→    // falling back to the latest stored layout via ref (not the stale closure value)
   162→    const layoutToUse = currentLayout || tileLayoutRef.current
   163→    console.log('[App] handleOpenSessionAtPosition called with:', { projectPath, dropZone, containerSize, currentTileLayout: layoutToUse, hadCurrentLayout: !!currentLayout })
   164→
   165→    if (!projectPath || projectPath === 'pending') {
   166→      console.error('[App] Invalid project path:', projectPath)
   167→      return
   168→    }
   169→
   170→    const project = projects.find((p) => p.path === projectPath)
   171→    console.log('[App] Found project:', project)
   172→    const effectiveBackend = (project?.backend && project.backend !== 'default'
   173→      ? project.backend
   174→      : (settings?.backend && settings.backend !== 'default'
   175→        ? settings.backend
   176→        : 'claude')) as BackendId
   177→    console.log('[App] Using backend:', effectiveBackend)
   178→
   179→    // Always create a new session when dragging to a position
   180→    const sessionId: string | undefined = undefined
   181→    const slug: string | undefined = undefined
   182→
   183→    const projectName = projectPath.split(/[/\\]/).pop() || projectPath
   184→    const title = slug ? `${projectName} - ${slug}` : `${projectName} - New`
   185→
   186→    try {
   187→      await api.ttsInstallInstructions?.(projectPath)
   188→      const ptyId = await api.spawnPty(projectPath, sessionId, undefined, effectiveBackend)
   189→
   190→      // Calculate the new layout based on the drop zone
   191→      let newLayout: TileLayout[]
   192→
   193→      // Re-read the latest layout after the async spawn (layout may have changed during await)
   194→      const latestLayout = currentLayout || tileLayoutRef.current
   195→
   196→      // Sidebar drag onto swap zone → always tab into target tile
   197→      if (dropZone && dropZone.type === 'swap') {
   198→        const targetTile = latestLayout.find(t => t.id === dropZone.targetTileId)
   199→        if (targetTile) {
   200→          console.log('[App] Adding as sub-tab to existing tile')
   201→          newLayout = addTabToExistingTile(latestLayout, targetTile.id, ptyId)
   202→        } else {
   203→          console.log('[App] Using addTileToLayout for swap (target not found)')
   204→          newLayout = addTileToLayout(latestLayout, ptyId, dropZone.targetTileId, containerSize.width, containerSize.height)
   205→        }
   206→      } else if (dropZone && dropZone.type !== 'swap') {
   207→        const direction = dropZone.type.replace('split-', '') as 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'
   208→        console.log('[App] Using splitTile with direction:', direction, 'targetTileId:', dropZone.targetTileId)
   209→        newLayout = splitTile(latestLayout, dropZone.targetTileId, ptyId, direction)
   210→      } else {
   211→        console.log('[App] Using addTileToLayout with no drop zone (null)')
   212→        newLayout = addTileToLayout(latestLayout, ptyId, null, containerSize.width, containerSize.height)
   213→      }
   214→      console.log('[App] New layout calculated:', newLayout)
   215→
   216→      // Add tab FIRST, then set layout LAST.
   217→      // This ensures our positioned layout is the final state update and
   218→      // won't be overwritten by useEffectiveLayout's generic positioning
   219→      // if there's an intermediate render between these two updates.
   220→      addTab({
   221→        id: ptyId,
   222→        projectPath,
   223→        sessionId,
   224→        title,
   225→        ptyId,
   226→        backend: effectiveBackend
   227→      })
   228→      setTileLayout(newLayout)
   229→    } catch (e: any) {
   230→      console.error('Failed to spawn PTY:', e)
   231→      const errorMsg = e?.message || String(e)
   232→      alert(`Failed to start Claude session:\n\n${errorMsg}\n\nPlease ensure Claude Code is installed and try restarting the application.`)
   233→    }
   234→  }, [api, addTab, projects, openTabs, settings?.backend, setTileLayout])
   235→
   236→  const handleCloseTab = useCallback((tabId: string) => {
   237→    const tab = openTabs.find(t => t.id === tabId)
   238→    if (tab) {
   239→      closedTabsRef.current.push({
   240→        projectPath: tab.projectPath,
   241→        sessionId: tab.sessionId,
   242→        title: tab.title,
   243→        backend: tab.backend
   244→      })
   245→      setClosedTabCount(closedTabsRef.current.length)
   246→    }
   247→    api.killPty(tabId)
   248→    clearTerminalBuffer(tabId)
   249→    removeTab(tabId)
   250→  }, [api, openTabs, removeTab])
   251→
   252→  const handleCloseProjectTabs = useCallback((projectPath: string) => {
   253→    const tabsToClose = openTabs.filter(tab => tab.projectPath === projectPath)
   254→    tabsToClose.forEach(tab => {
   255→      api.killPty(tab.id)
   256→      clearTerminalBuffer(tab.id)
   257→      removeTab(tab.id)
   258→    })
   259→  }, [api, openTabs, removeTab])
   260→
   261→  const handleProjectCreated = useCallback((projectPath: string, projectName: string) => {
   262→    addProject({ path: projectPath, name: projectName })
   263→    handleOpenSession(projectPath, undefined, undefined, undefined, false)
   264→  }, [addProject, handleOpenSession])
   265→
   266→  const handleUndoCloseTab = useCallback(() => {
   267→    const info = closedTabsRef.current.pop()
   268→    if (!info) return
   269→    setClosedTabCount(closedTabsRef.current.length)
   270→    handleOpenSession(info.projectPath, info.sessionId)
   271→  }, [handleOpenSession])
   272→
   273→  return {
   274→    handleAddProject,
   275→    handleAddProjectsFromParent,
   276→    handleOpenSession,
   277→    handleOpenSessionAtPosition,
   278→    handleCloseTab,
   279→    handleCloseProjectTabs,
   280→    handleProjectCreated,
   281→    handleUndoCloseTab,
   282→    canUndoCloseTab: closedTabCount > 0
   283→  }
   284→}
   285→

   144→      if (initialPrompt) {
   145→        setTimeout(() => {
   146→          api.writePty(ptyId, initialPrompt)
   147→          setTimeout(() => {
   148→            api.writePty(ptyId, '\r')
   149→          }, 100)
   150→        }, 1500)
   151→      }
   152→    } catch (e: any) {
   153→      console.error('Failed to spawn PTY:', e)
   154→      const errorMsg = e?.message || String(e)
   155→      alert(`Failed to start Claude session:\n\n${errorMsg}\n\nPlease ensure Claude Code is installed and try restarting the application.`)
   156→    }
   157→  }, [api, addTab, openTabs, projects, setActiveTab, settings?.backend, setTileLayout])
   158→
   159→  const handleOpenSessionAtPosition = useCallback(async (projectPath: string, dropZone: DropZone | null, containerSize: { width: number; height: number }, currentLayout?: TileLayout[]) => {
   160→    // Use the effective layout passed from the drop handler (matches what computeDropZone used),
   161→    // falling back to the latest stored layout via ref (not the stale closure value)
   162→    const layoutToUse = currentLayout || tileLayoutRef.current
   163→    console.log('[App] handleOpenSessionAtPosition called with:', { projectPath, dropZone, containerSize, currentTileLayout: layoutToUse, hadCurrentLayout: !!currentLayout })
   164→
   165→    if (!projectPath || projectPath === 'pending') {
   166→      console.error('[App] Invalid project path:', projectPath)
   167→      return
   168→    }
   169→
   170→    const project = projects.find((p) => p.path === projectPath)
   171→    console.log('[App] Found project:', project)
   172→    const effectiveBackend = (project?.backend && project.backend !== 'default'
   173→      ? project.backend
   174→      : (settings?.backend && settings.backend !== 'default'
   175→        ? settings.backend
   176→        : 'claude')) as BackendId
   177→    console.log('[App] Using backend:', effectiveBackend)
   178→
   179→    // Always create a new session when dragging to a position
   180→    const sessionId: string | undefined = undefined
   181→    const slug: string | undefined = undefined
   182→
   183→    const projectName = projectPath.split(/[/\\]/).pop() || projectPath
   184→    const title = slug ? `${projectName} - ${slug}` : `${projectName} - New`
   185→
   186→    try {
   187→      await api.ttsInstallInstructions?.(projectPath)
   188→      const ptyId = await api.spawnPty(projectPath, sessionId, undefined, effectiveBackend)
   189→
   190→      // Calculate the new layout based on the drop zone
   191→      let newLayout: TileLayout[]
   192→
   193→      // Re-read the latest layout after the async spawn (layout may have changed during await)
   194→      const latestLayout = currentLayout || tileLayoutRef.current
   195→
   196→      // Sidebar drag onto swap zone → always tab into target tile
   197→      if (dropZone && dropZone.type === 'swap') {
   198→        const targetTile = latestLayout.find(t => t.id === dropZone.targetTileId)
   199→        if (targetTile) {
   200→          console.log('[App] Adding as sub-tab to existing tile')
   201→          newLayout = addTabToExistingTile(latestLayout, targetTile.id, ptyId)
   202→        } else {
   203→          console.log('[App] Using addTileToLayout for swap (target not found)')
   204→          newLayout = addTileToLayout(latestLayout, ptyId, dropZone.targetTileId, containerSize.width, containerSize.height)
   205→        }
   206→      } else if (dropZone && dropZone.type !== 'swap') {
   207→        const direction = dropZone.type.replace('split-', '') as 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'
   208→        console.log('[App] Using splitTile with direction:', direction, 'targetTileId:', dropZone.targetTileId)
   209→        newLayout = splitTile(latestLayout, dropZone.targetTileId, ptyId, direction)
   210→      } else {
   211→        console.log('[App] Using addTileToLayout with no drop zone (null)')
   212→        newLayout = addTileToLayout(latestLayout, ptyId, null, containerSize.width, containerSize.height)
   213→      }
   214→      console.log('[App] New layout calculated:', newLayout)
   215→
   216→      // Add tab FIRST, then set layout LAST.
   217→      // This ensures our positioned layout is the final state update and
   218→      // won't be overwritten by useEffectiveLayout's generic positioning
   219→      // if there's an intermediate render between these two updates.
   220→      addTab({
   221→        id: ptyId,
   222→        projectPath,
   223→        sessionId,
   224→        title,
   225→        ptyId,
   226→        backend: effectiveBackend
   227→      })
   228→      setTileLayout(newLayout)
   229→    } catch (e: any) {
   230→      console.error('Failed to spawn PTY:', e)
   231→      const errorMsg = e?.message || String(e)
   232→      alert(`Failed to start Claude session:\n\n${errorMsg}\n\nPlease ensure Claude Code is installed and try restarting the application.`)
   233→    }
   234→  }, [api, addTab, projects, openTabs, settings?.backend, setTileLayout])
   235→
   236→  const handleCloseTab = useCallback((tabId: string) => {
   237→    const tab = openTabs.find(t => t.id === tabId)
   238→    if (tab) {
   239→      closedTabsRef.current.push({
   240→        projectPath: tab.projectPath,
   241→        sessionId: tab.sessionId,
   242→        title: tab.title,
   243→        backend: tab.backend
   244→      })
   245→      setClosedTabCount(closedTabsRef.current.length)
   246→    }
   247→    api.killPty(tabId)
   248→    clearTerminalBuffer(tabId)
   249→    removeTab(tabId)
   250→  }, [api, openTabs, removeTab])
   251→
   252→  const handleCloseProjectTabs = useCallback((projectPath: string) => {
   253→    const tabsToClose = openTabs.filter(tab => tab.projectPath === projectPath)
   254→    tabsToClose.forEach(tab => {
   255→      api.killPty(tab.id)
   256→      clearTerminalBuffer(tab.id)
   257→      removeTab(tab.id)
   258→    })
   259→  }, [api, openTabs, removeTab])
   260→
   261→  const handleProjectCreated = useCallback((projectPath: string, projectName: string) => {
   262→    addProject({ path: projectPath, name: projectName })
   263→    handleOpenSession(projectPath, undefined, undefined, undefined, false)
   264→  }, [addProject, handleOpenSession])
   265→
   266→  const handleUndoCloseTab = useCallback(() => {
   267→    const info = closedTabsRef.current.pop()
   268→    if (!info) return
   269→    setClosedTabCount(closedTabsRef.current.length)
   270→    handleOpenSession(info.projectPath, info.sessionId)
   271→  }, [handleOpenSession])
   272→
   273→  return {
   274→    handleAddProject,
   275→    handleAddProjectsFromParent,
   276→    handleOpenSession,
   277→    handleOpenSessionAtPosition,
   278→    handleCloseTab,
   279→    handleCloseProjectTabs,
   280→    handleProjectCreated,
   281→    handleUndoCloseTab,
   282→    canUndoCloseTab: closedTabCount > 0
   283→  }
   284→}

1→import { useMemo, useEffect, useRef, MutableRefObject } from 'react'
     2→import type { TileLayout } from '../tiled-layout-utils.js'
     3→import {
     4→  generateDefaultLayout,
     5→  validateLayout,
     6→  addTileToLayout,
     7→  removeTabFromTile,
     8→  getAllTabIdsFromLayout,
     9→  migrateTile
    10→} from '../tiled-layout-utils.js'
    11→import type { OpenTab } from './types.js'
    12→
    13→export function useEffectiveLayout(
    14→  layout: TileLayout[],
    15→  tabs: OpenTab[],
    16→  containerSizeRef: MutableRefObject<{ width: number; height: number }>,
    17→  onLayoutChange: (layout: TileLayout[]) => void
    18→): {
    19→  effectiveLayout: TileLayout[]
    20→  effectiveLayoutRef: MutableRefObject<TileLayout[]>
    21→  activeTabIdRef: MutableRefObject<string | null>
    22→} {
    23→  const effectiveLayoutRef = useRef<TileLayout[]>([])
    24→  const activeTabIdRef = useRef<string | null>(tabs.length > 0 ? tabs[tabs.length - 1].id : null)
    25→
    26→  const effectiveLayout = useMemo(() => {
    27→    const { width, height } = containerSizeRef.current
    28→
    29→    if (layout.length === 0) {
    30→      return generateDefaultLayout(tabs, width, height)
    31→    }
    32→
    33→    // Ensure all tiles are migrated to the new format
    34→    const migratedLayout = layout.map(migrateTile)
    35→
    36→    const layoutTabIds = getAllTabIdsFromLayout(migratedLayout)
    37→    const tabIds = new Set(tabs.map(t => t.id))
    38→    const addedTabs = tabs.filter(t => !layoutTabIds.has(t.id))
    39→    const removedTabIds = [...layoutTabIds].filter(id => !tabIds.has(id))
    40→
    41→    if (addedTabs.length === 0 && removedTabIds.length === 0) {
    42→      return validateLayout(migratedLayout, tabs, width, height)
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    let newLayout = [...migratedLayout]
    46→
    47→    // Remove tabs that no longer exist
    48→    for (const removedId of removedTabIds) {
    49→      newLayout = removeTabFromTile(newLayout, removedId, tabs, width, height)
    50→    }
    51→
    52→    // Add new tabs - each gets its own tile (no auto-grouping by project)
    53→    for (const addedTab of addedTabs) {
    54→      const existingIds = newLayout.map(l => l.id)
    55→      const activeId = existingIds.length > 0 ? existingIds[existingIds.length - 1] : null
    56→      newLayout = addTileToLayout(newLayout, addedTab.id, activeId, width, height)
    57→    }
    58→
    59→    if (tabs.length > 0) {
    60→      activeTabIdRef.current = tabs[tabs.length - 1].id
    61→    }
    62→
    63→    return validateLayout(newLayout, tabs, width, height)
    64→  }, [layout, tabs, containerSizeRef])
    65→
    66→  effectiveLayoutRef.current = effectiveLayout
    67→
    68→  useEffect(() => {
    69→    const layoutTabIds = getAllTabIdsFromLayout(layout.map(migrateTile))
    70→    const effectiveTabIds = getAllTabIdsFromLayout(effectiveLayout)
    71→    const idsMatch = layoutTabIds.size === effectiveTabIds.size &&
    72→      [...layoutTabIds].every(id => effectiveTabIds.has(id))
    73→
    74→    if (!idsMatch) {
    75→      onLayoutChange(effectiveLayout)
    76→    }
    77→  }, [effectiveLayout, layout, onLayoutChange])
    78→
    79→  return { effectiveLayout, effectiveLayoutRef, activeTabIdRef }
    80→}
    81→

    23→
    24→export function useWorkspaceLoader({
    25→  api,

    27→  setViewMode,
    28→  setTileLayout

    39→  const [settings, setSettings] = useState<AppSettings | null>(null)
    40→  const initRef = useRef(false)
    41→  const hadProjectsRef = useRef(false)
    42→
    43→  // Load workspace on mount and restore tabs
    44→  useEffect(() => {
    45→    // Prevent double initialization from StrictMode
    46→    if (initRef.current) return
    47→    initRef.current = true
    48→
    49→    const loadWorkspace = async () => {
    50→      try {
    51→        // Check if Claude, npm, and git-bash are installed
    52→        await checkInstallation()
    53→
    54→        // Load and apply theme with any saved customizations
    55→        const loadedSettings = await api.getSettings()
    56→        setSettings(loadedSettings)
    57→        const theme = getThemeById(loadedSettings.theme || 'default')
    58→        applyTheme(theme, loadedSettings.themeCustomization)
    59→        setCurrentTheme(theme)
    60→
    61→        // Kill any existing PTYs from hot reload (but don't clear buffers - they'll be restored)
    62→        const existingTabs = useWorkspaceStore.getState().openTabs
    63→        for (const tab of existingTabs) {
    64→          api.killPty(tab.id)
    65→        }
    66→        clearTabs()
    67→
    68→        const workspace = await api.getWorkspace()
    69→        if (workspace.projects) {
    70→          setProjects(workspace.projects)
    71→          if (workspace.projects.length > 0) {
    72→            hadProjectsRef.current = true
    73→          }
    74→          // Install TTS instructions for all existing projects
    75→          for (const project of workspace.projects) {
    76→            await api.ttsInstallInstructions?.(project.path)
    77→          }
    78→        }
    79→        // Load categories
    80→        if (workspace.categories) {
    81→          setCategories(workspace.categories)
    82→        }
    83→
    84→        // Restore previously open tabs (only if not already open)
    85→        // Track old ID -> new ID mapping for layout restoration
    86→        const idMapping = new Map<string, string>()

    88→        if (workspace.openTabs && workspace.openTabs.length > 0) {
    89→          const currentTabs = useWorkspaceStore.getState().openTabs

    99→              let titleToRestore = savedTab.title || `${projectName} - New`
   100→
   101→              // Get project and determine effective backend for restored tab
   102→              const projectForTab = workspace.projects?.find((p: { path: string }) => p.path === savedTab.projectPath)
   103→              const savedBackend = savedTab.backend
   104→              const effectiveBackendForTab = (savedBackend
   105→                || (projectForTab?.backend && projectForTab.backend !== 'default'
   106→                  ? projectForTab.backend
   107→                  : (loadedSettings?.backend && loadedSettings.backend !== 'default'
   108→                    ? loadedSettings.backend
   109→                    : 'claude'))) as BackendId
   110→
   111→              let sessionIdToRestore: string | undefined = savedTab.sessionId
   112→
   113→              // Always discover sessions to find the most recent one
   114→              let sessionsForProject = sessionsCache.get(savedTab.projectPath)
   115→              if (!sessionsForProject) {
   116→                const list = await api.discoverSessions(savedTab.projectPath, effectiveBackendForTab)
   117→                sessionsForProject = { list, nextIndex: 0 }
   118→                sessionsCache.set(savedTab.projectPath, sessionsForProject)
   119→              }
   120→
   121→              const list = sessionsForProject.list || []

   125→                  sessionIdToRestore = candidate.sessionId

   160→        const activeTabIds = useWorkspaceStore.getState().openTabs.map(t => t.id)

   163→        // Restore view mode

   181→              if (mappedTabIds.length === 0) return null
   182→
   183→              const newId = idMapping.get(tile.id) || mappedTabIds[0]

1→import { useState, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import { Project } from '../../../stores/workspace.js'
     3→import { DropTarget } from '../types.js'
     4→
     5→interface UseDragAndDropOptions {
     6→  projects: Project[]
     7→  moveProjectToCategory: (projectPath: string, categoryId: string | null) => void
     8→  reorderProjects: (categoryId: string | null, projectPaths: string[]) => void
     9→  reorderCategories: (categoryIds: string[]) => void
    10→  categories: Array<{ id: string; name: string; order: number; collapsed?: boolean }>
    11→}
    12→
    13→interface UseDragAndDropReturn {
    14→  draggedProject: string | null
    15→  draggedCategory: string | null
    16→  dropTarget: DropTarget | null
    17→  handleProjectDragStart: (e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string) => void
    18→  handleProjectDragEnd: () => void
    19→  handleCategoryDragOver: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => void
    20→  handleCategoryDrop: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => void
    21→  handleProjectDragOver: (
    22→    e: React.DragEvent,
    23→    projectPath: string,
    24→    position: 'before' | 'after'
    25→  ) => void
    26→  handleProjectDrop: (
    27→    e: React.DragEvent,
    28→    targetPath: string,
    29→    targetCategoryId: string | undefined
    30→  ) => void
    31→  handleCategoryDragStart: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string) => void
    32→  handleCategoryDragEnd: () => void
    33→  handleCategoryHeaderDragOver: (
    34→    e: React.DragEvent,
    35→    targetCategoryId: string,
    36→    position: 'before' | 'after'
    37→  ) => void
    38→  handleCategoryHeaderDrop: (e: React.DragEvent, targetCategoryId: string) => void
    39→}
    40→
    41→export function useDragAndDrop({
    42→  projects,
    43→  moveProjectToCategory,
    44→  reorderProjects,
    45→  reorderCategories,
    46→  categories,
    47→}: UseDragAndDropOptions): UseDragAndDropReturn {
    48→  const [draggedProject, setDraggedProject] = useState<string | null>(null)
    49→  const [draggedCategory, setDraggedCategory] = useState<string | null>(null)
    50→  const [dropTarget, setDropTarget] = useState<DropTarget | null>(null)
    51→
    52→  const handleProjectDragStart = useCallback((e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string) => {
    53→    setDraggedProject(projectPath)
    54→    e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move'
    55→    e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', projectPath)
    56→    // Also set custom type so TiledTerminalView can detect sidebar project drags
    57→    e.dataTransfer.setData('application/x-sidebar-project', projectPath)
    58→  }, [])
    59→
    60→  const handleProjectDragEnd = useCallback(() => {
    61→    setDraggedProject(null)
    62→    setDropTarget(null)
    63→  }, [])
    64→
    65→  const handleCategoryDragOver = useCallback(
    66→    (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => {
    67→      e.preventDefault()
    68→      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move'
    69→      if (draggedProject) {
    70→        setDropTarget({
    71→          type: categoryId ? 'category' : 'uncategorized',
    72→          id: categoryId,
    73→        })
    74→      }
    75→    },
    76→    [draggedProject]
    77→  )
    78→
    79→  const handleCategoryDrop = useCallback(
    80→    (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => {
    81→      e.preventDefault()
    82→      if (draggedProject) {
    83→        moveProjectToCategory(draggedProject, categoryId)
    84→      }
    85→      setDraggedProject(null)
    86→      setDropTarget(null)
    87→    },
    88→    [draggedProject, moveProjectToCategory]
    89→  )
    90→
    91→  const handleProjectDragOver = useCallback(
    92→    (e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string, position: 'before' | 'after') => {
    93→      e.preventDefault()
    94→      e.stopPropagation()
    95→      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move'
    96→      if (draggedProject && draggedProject !== projectPath) {
    97→        setDropTarget({ type: 'project', id: projectPath, position })
    98→      }
    99→    },
   100→    [draggedProject]
   101→  )
   102→
   103→  const handleProjectDrop = useCallback(
   104→    (e: React.DragEvent, targetPath: string, targetCategoryId: string | undefined) => {
   105→      e.preventDefault()
   106→      e.stopPropagation()
   107→
   108→      if (draggedProject && draggedProject !== targetPath) {
   109→        const draggedProjectData = projects.find((p) => p.path === draggedProject)
   110→        const targetProject = projects.find((p) => p.path === targetPath)
   111→
   112→        if (draggedProjectData && targetProject) {
   113→          moveProjectToCategory(draggedProject, targetCategoryId ?? null)
   114→          const categoryProjects = projects
   115→            .filter((p) =>
   116→              targetCategoryId ? p.categoryId === targetCategoryId : !p.categoryId
   117→            )
   118→            .sort((a, b) => (a.order ?? 0) - (b.order ?? 0))
   119→            .map((p) => p.path)
   120→
   121→          const newOrder = categoryProjects.filter((p) => p !== draggedProject)
   122→          const targetIndex = newOrder.indexOf(targetPath)
   123→          const insertIndex = dropTarget?.position === 'after' ? targetIndex + 1 : targetIndex
   124→          newOrder.splice(insertIndex, 0, draggedProject)
   125→          reorderProjects(targetCategoryId ?? null, newOrder)
   126→        }
   127→      }
   128→      setDraggedProject(null)
   129→      setDropTarget(null)
   130→    },
   131→    [draggedProject, projects, dropTarget, moveProjectToCategory, reorderProjects]
   132→  )
   133→
   134→  const handleCategoryDragStart = useCallback((e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string) => {
   135→    setDraggedCategory(categoryId)
   136→    e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move'
   137→    e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', categoryId)
   138→  }, [])
   139→
   140→  const handleCategoryDragEnd = useCallback(() => {
   141→    setDraggedCategory(null)
   142→    setDropTarget(null)
   143→  }, [])
   144→
   145→  const handleCategoryHeaderDragOver = useCallback(
   146→    (e: React.DragEvent, targetCategoryId: string, position: 'before' | 'after') => {
   147→      e.preventDefault()
   148→      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move'
   149→      if (draggedCategory && draggedCategory !== targetCategoryId) {
   150→        setDropTarget({ type: 'category', id: targetCategoryId, position })
   151→      }
   152→    },
   153→    [draggedCategory]
   154→  )
   155→
   156→  const handleCategoryHeaderDrop = useCallback(
   157→    (e: React.DragEvent, targetCategoryId: string) => {
   158→      e.preventDefault()
   159→      if (draggedCategory && draggedCategory !== targetCategoryId) {
   160→        const orderedCategories = [...categories].sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order)
   161→        const categoryIds = orderedCategories.map((c) => c.id)
   162→        const newOrder = categoryIds.filter((id) => id !== draggedCategory)
   163→        const targetIndex = newOrder.indexOf(targetCategoryId)
   164→        const insertIndex = dropTarget?.position === 'after' ? targetIndex + 1 : targetIndex
   165→        newOrder.splice(insertIndex, 0, draggedCategory)
   166→        reorderCategories(newOrder)
   167→      }
   168→      setDraggedCategory(null)
   169→      setDropTarget(null)
   170→    },
   171→    [draggedCategory, categories, dropTarget, reorderCategories]
   172→  )
   173→
   174→  return {
   175→    draggedProject,
   176→    draggedCategory,
   177→    dropTarget,
   178→    handleProjectDragStart,
   179→    handleProjectDragEnd,

```
     1→import { useState, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import { Project } from '../../../stores/workspace.js'
     3→import { DropTarget } from '../types.js'
     4→
     5→interface UseDragAndDropOptions {
     6→  projects: Project[]
     7→  moveProjectToCategory: (projectPath: string, categoryId: string | null) => void
     8→  reorderProjects: (categoryId: string | null, projectPaths: string[]) => void
     9→  reorderCategories: (categoryIds: string[]) => void
    10→  categories: Array<{ id: string; name: string; order: number; collapsed?: boolean }>
    11→}
    12→
    13→interface UseDragAndDropReturn {
    14→  draggedProject: string | null
    15→  draggedCategory: string | null
    16→  dropTarget: DropTarget | null
    17→  handleProjectDragStart: (e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string) => void
    18→  handleProjectDragEnd: () => void
    19→  handleCategoryDragOver: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => void
    20→  handleCategoryDrop: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => void
    21→  handleProjectDragOver: (
    22→    e: React.DragEvent,
    23→    projectPath: string,
    24→    position: 'before' | 'after'
    25→  ) => void
    26→  handleProjectDrop: (
    27→    e: React.DragEvent,
    28→    targetPath: string,
    29→    targetCategoryId: string | undefined
    30→  ) => void
    31→  handleCategoryDragStart: (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string) => void
    32→  handleCategoryDragEnd: () => void
    33→  handleCategoryHeaderDragOver: (
    34→    e: React.DragEvent,
    35→    targetCategoryId: string,
    36→    position: 'before' | 'after'
    37→  ) => void
    38→  handleCategoryHeaderDrop: (e: React.DragEvent, targetCategoryId: string) => void
    39→}
    40→
    41→export function useDragAndDrop({
    42→  projects,
    43→  moveProjectToCategory,
    44→  reorderProjects,
    45→  reorderCategories,
    46→  categories,
    47→}: UseDragAndDropOptions): UseDragAndDropReturn {
    48→  const [draggedProject, setDraggedProject] = useState<string | null>(null)
    49→  const [draggedCategory, setDraggedCategory] = useState<string | null>(null)
    50→  const [dropTarget, setDropTarget] = useState<DropTarget | null>(null)
    51→
    52→  const handleProjectDragStart = useCallback((e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string) => {
    53→    setDraggedProject(projectPath)
    54→    e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move'
    55→    e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', projectPath)
    56→    // Also set custom type so TiledTerminalView can detect sidebar project drags
    57→    e.dataTransfer.setData('application/x-sidebar-project', projectPath)
    58→  }, [])
    59→
    60→  const handleProjectDragEnd = useCallback(() => {
    61→    setDraggedProject(null)
    62→    setDropTarget(null)
    63→  }, [])
    64→
    65→  const handleCategoryDragOver = useCallback(
    66→    (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => {
    67→      e.preventDefault()
    68→      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move'
    69→      if (draggedProject) {
    70→        setDropTarget({
    71→          type: categoryId ? 'category' : 'uncategorized',
    72→          id: categoryId,
    73→        })
    74→      }
    75→    },
    76→    [draggedProject]
    77→  )
    78→
    79→  const handleCategoryDrop = useCallback(
    80→    (e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string | null) => {
    81→      e.preventDefault()
    82→      if (draggedProject) {
    83→        moveProjectToCategory(draggedProject, categoryId)
    84→      }
    85→      setDraggedProject(null)
    86→      setDropTarget(null)
    87→    },
    88→    [draggedProject, moveProjectToCategory]
    89→  )
    90→
    91→  const handleProjectDragOver = useCallback(
    92→    (e: React.DragEvent, projectPath: string, position: 'before' | 'after') => {
    93→      e.preventDefault()
    94→      e.stopPropagation()
    95→      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move'
    96→      if (draggedProject && draggedProject !== projectPath) {
    97→        setDropTarget({ type: 'project', id: projectPath, position })
    98→      }
    99→    },
   100→    [draggedProject]
   101→  )
   102→
   103→  const handleProjectDrop = useCallback(
   104→    (e: React.DragEvent, targetPath: string, targetCategoryId: string | undefined) => {
   105→      e.preventDefault()
   106→      e.stopPropagation()
   107→
   108→      if (draggedProject && draggedProject !== targetPath) {
   109→        const draggedProjectData = projects.find((p) => p.path === draggedProject)
   110→        const targetProject = projects.find((p) => p.path === targetPath)
   111→
   112→        if (draggedProjectData && targetProject) {
   113→          moveProjectToCategory(draggedProject, targetCategoryId ?? null)
   114→          const categoryProjects = projects
   115→            .filter((p) =>
   116→              targetCategoryId ? p.categoryId === targetCategoryId : !p.categoryId
   117→            )
   118→            .sort((a, b) => (a.order ?? 0) - (b.order ?? 0))
   119→            .map((p) => p.path)
   120→
   121→          const newOrder = categoryProjects.filter((p) => p !== draggedProject)
   122→          const targetIndex = newOrder.indexOf(targetPath)
   123→          const insertIndex = dropTarget?.position === 'after' ? targetIndex + 1 : targetIndex
   124→          newOrder.splice(insertIndex, 0, draggedProject)
   125→          reorderProjects(targetCategoryId ?? null, newOrder)
   126→        }
   127→      }
   128→      setDraggedProject(null)
   129→      setDropTarget(null)
   130→    },
   131→    [draggedProject, projects, dropTarget, moveProjectToCategory, reorderProjects]
   132→  )
   133→
   134→  const handleCategoryDragStart = useCallback((e: React.DragEvent, categoryId: string) => {
   135→    setDraggedCategory(categoryId)
   136→    e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move'
   137→    e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', categoryId)
   138→  }, [])
   139→
   140→  const handleCategoryDragEnd = useCallback(() => {
   141→    setDraggedCategory(null)
   142→    setDropTarget(null)
   143→  }, [])
   144→
   145→  const handleCategoryHeaderDragOver = useCallback(
   146→    (e: React.DragEvent, targetCategoryId: string, position: 'before' | 'after') => {
   147→      e.preventDefault()
   148→      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move'
   149→      if (draggedCategory && draggedCategory !== targetCategoryId) {
   150→        setDropTarget({ type: 'category', id: targetCategoryId, position })
   151→      }
   152→    },
   153→    [draggedCategory]
   154→  )
   155→
   156→  const handleCategoryHeaderDrop = useCallback(
   157→    (e: React.DragEvent, targetCategoryId: string) => {
   158→      e.preventDefault()
   159→      if (draggedCategory && draggedCategory !== targetCategoryId) {
   160→        const orderedCategories = [...categories].sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order)
   161→        const categoryIds = orderedCategories.map((c) => c.id)
   162→        const newOrder = categoryIds.filter((id) => id !== draggedCategory)
   163→        const targetIndex = newOrder.indexOf(targetCategoryId)
   164→        const insertIndex = dropTarget?.position === 'after' ? targetIndex + 1 : targetIndex
   165→        newOrder.splice(insertIndex, 0, draggedCategory)
   166→        reorderCategories(newOrder)
   167→      }
   168→      setDraggedCategory(null)
   169→      setDropTarget(null)
   170→    },
   171→    [draggedCategory, categories, dropTarget, reorderCategories]
   172→  )
   173→
   174→  return {
   175→    draggedProject,
   176→    draggedCategory,
   177→    dropTarget,
   178→    handleProjectDragStart,
   179→    handleProjectDragEnd,
   180→    handleCategoryDragOver,
   181→    handleCategoryDrop,
   182→    handleProjectDragOver,
   183→    handleProjectDrop,
   184→    handleCategoryDragStart,
   185→    handleCategoryDragEnd,
   186→    handleCategoryHeaderDragOver,
   187→    handleCategoryHeaderDrop,
   188→  }
   189→}
   190→
```

rawInput.command:
cd "/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal" && kspec task note @01KKAWM4Y4E24TFEAPSDXZS99G "4 bugs fixed:
1. useDragAndDrop.ts: stale dropTarget position — handleProjectDrop and handleCategoryHeaderDrop read dropTarget?.position from React state closure which could be stale when drop fires (React may not have re-rendered since last dragOver). Added dropTargetRef that's updated synchronously alongside state, so drop handlers always read the latest position.
2. useSidebarHandlers.ts: rename Escape saves via blur — pressing Escape during inline rename calls setEditingProject(null), React unmounts the input, browser fires blur with the OLD handler that still has editingProject in closure, causing an unwanted save. Added renameCancelledRef that gets set on Escape and checked in the blur handler.
3. useSidebarHandlers.ts: same Escape→blur bug for category rename — identical pattern, added categoryRenameCancelledRef.
4. useProjectHandlers.ts: handleCloseProjectTabs missing undo history — unlike handleCloseTab (single tab), closing all project tabs didn't save to closedTabsRef, making undo impossible. Added push to closedTabsRef for each closed tab."

rawInput.command:
cd "/home/user/Programs/Claude Projects/Claude-Terminal" && gh pr create --title "fix: sidebar bugs — drag reorder, rename Escape, close-all undo" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- **Drag-to-reorder losing position**: `handleProjectDrop` and `handleCategoryHeaderDrop` read `dropTarget?.position` from React state closure, which could be stale if React hadn't re-rendered since the last `dragOver`. Added `dropTargetRef` updated synchronously alongside state so drop handlers always read the latest position.
- **Inline rename saving on Escape**: Pressing Escape during rename fired blur with the old handler (from before the re-render that unmounted the input), causing an unwanted save. Added `renameCancelledRef` checked in the blur handler to skip saving after Escape.
- **Category rename same Escape/blur bug**: Same pattern, added `categoryRenameCancelledRef`.
- **Close-all-tabs missing undo**: `handleCloseProjectTabs` didn't push closed tabs to the undo history (`closedTabsRef`), unlike single-tab close. Added push for each closed tab.

## Test plan
- [ ] Drag a project to reorder within its category — verify it lands at the correct position (above/below target)
- [ ] Drag a project to a different category — verify position is correct
- [ ] Drag a category to reorder — verify correct position
- [ ] Start inline rename on a project, press Escape — verify name reverts (not saved)
- [ ] Start inline rename on a project, click away — verify name IS saved
- [ ] Start inline rename on a category, press Escape — verify name reverts
- [ ] Close all tabs for a project via the × button — verify Ctrl+Z / undo can restore them

Task: @bug-sidebar
Spec: @sidebar

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"

- **Inline rename saving on Escape**: Pressing Escape during rename fired blur with the old handler (from before the re-render that unmounted the input), causing an unwanted save. Added `renameCancelledRef` checked in the blur handler to skip saving after Escape.
- **Category rename same Escape/blur bug**: Same pattern, added `categoryRenameCancelledRef`.
- **Close-all-tabs missing undo**: `handleCloseProjectTabs` didn't push closed tabs to the undo history (`closedTabsRef`), unlike single-tab close. Added push for each closed tab.

## Test plan
- [ ] Drag a project to reorder within its category — verify it lands at the correct position (above/below target)
- [ ] Drag a project to a different category — verify position is correct
- [ ] Drag a category to reorder — verify correct position

- [ ] Start inline rename on a project, click away — verify name IS saved
- [ ] Start inline rename on a category, press Escape — verify name reverts
- [ ] Close all tabs for a project via the × button — verify Ctrl+Z / undo can restore them

EOF
)"
